3050/*** Start of inlined file: Enums.hpp ***/
3051//
3052// Created by robin on 22.03.2020.
3053//
3054
3055#ifndef TILESON_ENUMS_HPP
3056#define TILESON_ENUMS_HPP
3057#include <cstdint>
3058
3059/*** Start of inlined file: EnumBitflags.hpp ***/
3060//
3061// Created by robin on 08.11.2020.
3062//
3063
3064#ifndef TILESON_ENUMBITFLAGS_HPP
3065#define TILESON_ENUMBITFLAGS_HPP
3066
3067#include <type_traits>
3068#include <iostream>
3069
3070#define TILESON_ENABLE_BITMASK_OPERATORS(x) \
3071namespace tson { \
3072 ENABLE_BITMASK_OPERATORS(x) \
3073}
3074
3075namespace tson
3076{
3077 #define ENABLE_BITMASK_OPERATORS(x) \
3078 template<> \
3079 struct EnableBitMaskOperators<x> \
3080 { \
3081 static const bool enable = true; \
3082 };
3083
3084 template<typename Enum>
3085 struct EnableBitMaskOperators
3086 {
3087 static const bool enable = false;
3088 };
3089
3090 template<typename Enum>
3091 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3092 operator |(Enum lhs, Enum rhs)
3093 {
3094 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3095 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3096
3097 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3098
3099 return static_cast<Enum> (
3100 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) |
3101 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3102 );
3103 }
3104
3105 //Permissions operator &(Permissions lhs, Permissions rhs)
3106 template<typename Enum>
3107 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3108 operator &(Enum lhs, Enum rhs)
3109 {
3110 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3111 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3112
3113 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3114
3115 return static_cast<Enum> (
3116 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) &
3117 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3118 );
3119 }
3120
3121 //Permissions operator ^(Permissions lhs, Permissions rhs)
3122 template<typename Enum>
3123 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3124 operator ^(Enum lhs, Enum rhs)
3125 {
3126 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3127 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3128
3129 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3130
3131 return static_cast<Enum> (
3132 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) ^
3133 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3134 );
3135 }
3136
3137 //Permissions operator ~(Permissions rhs)
3138 template<typename Enum>
3139 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3140 operator ~(Enum rhs)
3141 {
3142 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3143 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3144
3145 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3146
3147 return static_cast<Enum> (
3148 ~static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3149 );
3150 }
3151
3152 //Permissions& operator |=(Permissions &lhs, Permissions rhs)
3153 template<typename Enum>
3154 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3155 &operator |=(Enum &lhs, Enum rhs)
3156 {
3157 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3158 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3159
3160 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3161
3162 lhs = static_cast<Enum> (
3163 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) |
3164 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3165 );
3166
3167 return lhs;
3168 }
3169
3170 //Permissions& operator &=(Permissions &lhs, Permissions rhs)
3171 template<typename Enum>
3172 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3173 &operator &=(Enum &lhs, Enum rhs)
3174 {
3175 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3176 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3177
3178 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3179
3180 lhs = static_cast<Enum> (
3181 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) &
3182 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3183 );
3184
3185 return lhs;
3186 }
3187
3188 //Permissions& operator ^=(Permissions &lhs, Permissions rhs)
3189 template<typename Enum>
3190 typename std::enable_if<EnableBitMaskOperators<Enum>::enable, Enum>::type
3191 &operator ^=(Enum &lhs, Enum rhs)
3192 {
3193 static_assert(std::is_enum<Enum>::value,
3194 "template parameter is not an enum type");
3195
3196 using underlying = typename std::underlying_type<Enum>::type;
3197
3198 lhs = static_cast<Enum> (
3199 static_cast<underlying>(lhs) ^
3200 static_cast<underlying>(rhs)
3201 );
3202
3203 return lhs;
3204 }
3205}
3206
3207#endif //TILESON_ENUMBITFLAGS_HPP
3208
3209/*** End of inlined file: EnumBitflags.hpp ***/
3210
3211
3212namespace tson
3213{
3217 enum class Type : uint8_t
3218 {
3219 Undefined = 0,
3220 Color = 1,
3221 File = 2,
3222 Int = 3,
3223 Boolean = 4,
3224 Float = 5,
3225 String = 6,
3226 Class = 7,
3227 Enum = 8,
3228 Object = 9
3229 };
3230
3235 enum class LayerType : uint8_t
3236 {
3237 Undefined = 0,
3238 TileLayer = 1,
3239 ObjectGroup = 2,
3240 ImageLayer = 3,
3241 Group = 4
3242 };
3243
3247 enum class ParseStatus : uint8_t
3248 {
3249 OK = 0, //OK unless otherwise stated
3250 FileNotFound = 1,
3251 ParseError = 2,
3252 MissingData = 3,
3253 DecompressionError = 4
3254 };
3255
3259 enum class ObjectType : uint8_t
3260 {
3261 Undefined = 0,
3262 Object = 1,
3263 Ellipse = 2,
3264 Rectangle = 3,
3265 Point = 4,
3266 Polygon = 5,
3267 Polyline = 6,
3268 Text = 7,
3269 Template = 8
3270 };
3271
3272 static constexpr uint32_t FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG = 0x80000000;
3273 static constexpr uint32_t FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG = 0x40000000;
3274 static constexpr uint32_t FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG = 0x20000000;
3278 enum class TileFlipFlags : uint32_t
3279 {
3280 None = 0,
3281 Diagonally = FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG,
3282 Vertically = FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG,
3283 Horizontally = FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG
3284 };
3285
3289 enum class ObjectAlignment : uint8_t
3290 {
3291 Unspecified = 0, //unspecified
3292 TopLeft = 1, //topleft
3293 Top = 2, //top
3294 TopRight = 3, //topright
3295 Left = 4, //left
3296 Center = 5, //center
3297 Right = 6, //right
3298 BottomLeft = 7, //bottomleft
3299 Bottom = 8, //bottom
3300 BottomRight = 9 //bottomright
3301 };
3302
3306 enum class TextAlignment : uint8_t
3307 {
3308 Unresolved = 0,
3309 Left = 1, //left
3310 Center = 2, //center
3311 Right = 3, //right
3312 Justify = 4, //justify
3313 Top = 5, //top
3314 Bottom = 6 //bottom
3315 };
3316
3320 enum class TileRenderSize : uint8_t
3321 {
3322 Undefined = 0,
3323 Tile = 1, //tile (default)
3324 Grid = 2 //grid
3325 };
3326
3330 enum class FillMode : uint8_t
3331 {
3332 Undefined = 0,
3333 Stretch = 1, //stretch (default)
3334 PreserveAspectFit = 2 //preserve-aspect-fit
3335 };
3336
3337 enum class EnumStorageType : uint8_t
3338 {
3339 Unspecified = 0,
3340 Int = 1,
3341 String = 2
3342 };
3343
3344 ENABLE_BITMASK_OPERATORS(TileFlipFlags)
3345}
3346
3347#endif //TILESON_ENUMS_HPP
3348
3349/*** End of inlined file: Enums.hpp ***/
3350
3351
3352//#include "../external/json.hpp"
3353
3354namespace tson
3355{
3356 class Project;
3357
3358 class Property
3359 {
3360 public:
3361
3362 //enum class Type : uint8_t
3363 //{
3364 // Undefined = 0,
3365 // Color = 1, /*! color */
3366 // File = 2, /*! file */
3367 // Int = 3, /*! int */
3368 // Boolean = 4, /*! bool */
3369 // Float = 5, /*! float */
3370 // String = 6 /*! string */
3371 //};
3372
3373 inline Property();
3374 inline explicit Property(IJson &json, tson::Project *project = nullptr);
3375 inline Property(std::string name, std::any value, Type type);
3376
3377 inline void setValue(const std::any &value);
3378 inline void setStrValue(const std::string &value);
3379 inline void setName(const std::string &name);
3380
3381 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::type_info& getValueType() const;
3382 inline std::string getValueTypeInfo();
3383 [[nodiscard]]inline const std::any &getValue() const;
3384 template <typename T>
3385 inline T getValue() const;
3386 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
3387 [[nodiscard]] inline Type getType() const;
3388 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getPropertyType() const;
3389
3390 //Became public in v1.4.0
3391 inline void setValueByType(IJson &json); //Definition in tileson_forward.hpp
3392
3393 protected:
3394 inline void setTypeByString(const std::string &str);
3395
3396 tson::Project *m_project = nullptr; //Used for resolving 'enum' and 'class' objects
3397 Type m_type = Type::Undefined;
3398 std::string m_name {};
3399 std::string m_propertyType {};
3400 std::any m_value; //Using std::any to assign any type
3401 };
3402
3403 template<typename T>
3404 T Property::getValue() const
3405 {
3406 bool isCorrectType = (m_value.type() == typeid(T));
3407
3408 if(isCorrectType)
3409 {
3410 T value = std::any_cast<T>(m_value);
3411 return value;
3412 }
3413 else
3414 {
3415 static T defaultValue;
3416 return defaultValue;
3417 }
3418 }
3419}
3420
3421tson::Property::Property() : m_name {"unnamed"}
3422{
3423
3424}
3425
3426tson::Property::Property(IJson &json, tson::Project *project) : m_project {project}
3427{
3428 m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>();
3429 if(json.count("propertytype") > 0)
3430 m_propertyType = json["propertytype"].get<std::string>();
3431 else if(json.count("propertyType") > 0) //Somehow Tiled's class objects uses propertyType with 'T'.
3432 m_propertyType = json["propertyType"].get<std::string>();
3433
3434 setTypeByString(json["type"].get<std::string>());
3435 setValueByType(json["value"]);
3436}
3437
3438tson::Property::Property(std::string name, std::any value, Type type) : m_name { move(name) }, m_value { move(value) }, m_type {type}
3439{
3440
3441}
3442
3443void tson::Property::setValue(const std::any &value)
3444{
3445 m_value = value;
3446}
3447
3454void tson::Property::setStrValue(const std::string &value)
3455{
3456 m_value = value;
3457}
3458
3459const std::any &tson::Property::getValue() const
3460{
3461 return m_value;
3462}
3463
3464void tson::Property::setName(const std::string &name)
3465{
3466 m_name = name;
3467}
3468
3469const std::string &tson::Property::getName() const
3470{
3471 return m_name;
3472}
3473
3480
3481const std::type_info &tson::Property::getValueType() const
3482{
3483 return m_value.type();
3484}
3485
3494std::string tson::Property::getValueTypeInfo()
3495{
3496 return m_value.type().name();
3497}
3498
3499tson::Type tson::Property::getType() const
3500{
3501 return m_type;
3502}
3503
3504void tson::Property::setTypeByString(const std::string &str)
3505{
3506 if(str == "color")
3507 m_type = tson::Type::Color;
3508 else if(str == "file")
3509 m_type = tson::Type::File;
3510 else if(str == "int")
3511 m_type = tson::Type::Int;
3512 else if(str == "bool")
3513 m_type = tson::Type::Boolean;
3514 else if(str == "float")
3515 m_type = tson::Type::Float;
3516 else if(str == "string")
3517 m_type = tson::Type::String;
3518 else if(str == "class")
3519 m_type = tson::Type::Class;
3520 else if(str == "object")
3521 m_type = tson::Type::Object;
3522 else
3523 m_type = tson::Type::Undefined;
3524}
3525
3526const std::string &tson::Property::getPropertyType() const
3527{
3528 return m_propertyType;
3529}
3530
3531#endif //TILESON_PROPERTY_HPP
3532
3533/*** End of inlined file: Property.hpp ***/
3534
3535//#include "../external/json.hpp"
3536#include <map>
3537
3538namespace tson
3539{
3540 class PropertyCollection
3541 {
3542 public:
3543 inline PropertyCollection() = default;
3544
3545 inline explicit PropertyCollection(std::string id);
3546
3547 inline tson::Property * add(const tson::Property &property);
3548 inline tson::Property * add(IJson &json, tson::Project *project = nullptr);
3549 inline tson::Property * add(const std::string &name, const std::any &value, tson::Type type);
3550
3551 inline void remove(const std::string &name);
3552
3553 inline void setValue(const std::string &name, const std::any &value);
3554 inline void setId(const std::string &id);
3555
3556 inline bool hasProperty(const std::string &name);
3557 inline tson::Property * getProperty(const std::string &name);
3558 inline std::map<std::string, Property> &getProperties();
3559 inline std::vector<Property*> get();
3560 template <typename T>
3561 inline T getValue(const std::string &name);
3562 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getId() const;
3563 [[nodiscard]] inline size_t getSize() const;
3564
3565 protected:
3566 std::string m_id;
3567 std::map<std::string, tson::Property> m_properties;
3568 };
3569}
3570
3571template<typename T>
3572T tson::PropertyCollection::getValue(const std::string &name)
3573{
3574 static T defaultT;
3575 return (m_properties.count(name) > 0) ? m_properties[name].getValue<T>() : defaultT;
3576}
3577
3578tson::PropertyCollection::PropertyCollection(std::string id) : m_id {std::move(id)}
3579{
3580
3581}
3582
3583tson::Property *tson::PropertyCollection::add(const tson::Property &property)
3584{
3585 m_properties[property.getName()] = property;
3586 return &m_properties[property.getName()];
3587}
3588
3589tson::Property *tson::PropertyCollection::add(IJson &json, tson::Project *project)
3590{
3591 tson::Property property = tson::Property(json, project);
3592 std::string name = property.getName();
3593 m_properties[name] = std::move(property);
3594 return &m_properties[name];
3595}
3596
3597tson::Property *tson::PropertyCollection::add(const std::string &name, const std::any &value, tson::Type type)
3598{
3599 m_properties[name] = {name, value, type};
3600 return &m_properties[name];
3601}
3602
3603void tson::PropertyCollection::remove(const std::string &name)
3604{
3605 m_properties.erase(name);
3606}
3607
3614void tson::PropertyCollection::setValue(const std::string &name, const std::any &value)
3615{
3616 if(m_properties.count(name) > 0)
3617 m_properties[name].setValue(value);
3618}
3619
3620void tson::PropertyCollection::setId(const std::string &id)
3621{
3622 m_id = id;
3623}
3624
3625bool tson::PropertyCollection::hasProperty(const std::string &name)
3626{
3627 return m_properties.count(name) > 0;
3628}
3629
3630tson::Property *tson::PropertyCollection::getProperty(const std::string &name)
3631{
3632 return (m_properties.count(name) > 0) ? &m_properties[name] : nullptr;
3633}
3634
3635std::map<std::string, tson::Property> &tson::PropertyCollection::getProperties()
3636{
3637 return m_properties;
3638}
3639
3644std::vector<tson::Property *> tson::PropertyCollection::get()
3645{
3646 std::vector<tson::Property *> props;
3647 for(auto &i : m_properties)
3648 props.emplace_back(&i.second);
3649
3650 return props;
3651}
3652
3653const std::string &tson::PropertyCollection::getId() const
3654{
3655 return m_id;
3656}
3657
3658size_t tson::PropertyCollection::getSize() const
3659{
3660 return m_properties.size();
3661}
3662
3663#endif //TILESON_PROPERTYCOLLECTION_HPP
3664
3665/*** End of inlined file: PropertyCollection.hpp ***/
3666
3667
3668/*** Start of inlined file: Text.hpp ***/
3669//
3670// Created by robin on 05.08.2019.
3671//
3672
3673#ifndef TILESON_TEXT_HPP
3674#define TILESON_TEXT_HPP
3675
3676#include <string>
3677
3678namespace tson
3679{
3680 class Text
3681 {
3682 public:
3683 inline Text() = default;
3689 //inline Text(std::string _text, bool _wrap, tson::Colori _color) : text {std::move(_text)}, wrap {_wrap}, color {_color} {};
3690 inline explicit Text(IJson &json)
3691 {
3692 bool hasColor = json.count("color") > 0;
3693 tson::Color c = (hasColor) ? tson::Colori(json["color"].get<std::string>()) : tson::Colori();
3694 color = c;
3695 text = (json.count("text") > 0) ? json["text"].get<std::string>() : "";
3696 wrap = (json.count("wrap") > 0) ? json["wrap"].get<bool>() : false;
3697
3698 //Previously missing properties
3699 bold = (json.count("bold") > 0) ? json["bold"].get<bool>() : false;
3700 fontFamily = (json.count("fontfamily") > 0) ? json["fontfamily"].get<std::string>() : "sans-serif";
3701 horizontalAlignment = (json.count("halign") > 0) ? resolveTextAlignmentByString(json["halign"].get<std::string>()) : TextAlignment::Left;
3702 italic = (json.count("italic") > 0) ? json["italic"].get<bool>() : false;
3703 kerning = (json.count("kerning") > 0) ? json["kerning"].get<bool>() : true;
3704 pixelSize = (json.count("pixelsize") > 0) ? json["pixelsize"].get<int32_t>() : 16;
3705 strikeout = (json.count("strikeout") > 0) ? json["strikeout"].get<bool>() : false;
3706 underline = (json.count("underline") > 0) ? json["underline"].get<bool>() : false;
3707 verticalAlignment = (json.count("valign") > 0) ? resolveTextAlignmentByString(json["valign"].get<std::string>()) : TextAlignment::Top;
3708 };
3709
3710 //Just make it simple
3711 std::string text {};
3712 tson::Colori color {};
3713 bool wrap{};
3714
3715 //Previously missing properties
3716 bool bold {false};
3717 std::string fontFamily {"sans-serif"};
3718 TextAlignment horizontalAlignment {TextAlignment::Left};
3719 bool italic {false};
3720 bool kerning {true};
3721 int pixelSize {16};
3722 bool strikeout {false};
3723 bool underline {false};
3724 TextAlignment verticalAlignment {TextAlignment::Top};
3725
3726 private:
3727 [[nodiscard]] TextAlignment resolveTextAlignmentByString(const std::string &str) const
3728 {
3729 if(str == "left") return TextAlignment::Left;
3730 if(str == "center") return TextAlignment::Center;
3731 if(str == "right") return TextAlignment::Right;
3732 if(str == "justify") return TextAlignment::Justify;
3733 if(str == "top") return TextAlignment::Top;
3734 if(str == "bottom") return TextAlignment::Bottom;
3735
3736 return TextAlignment::Unresolved;
3737 }
3738 };
3739}
3740
3741#endif //TILESON_TEXT_HPP
3742
3743/*** End of inlined file: Text.hpp ***/
3744
3745namespace tson
3746{
3747 class TiledClass;
3748 class Map;
3749 class Object
3750 {
3751 public:
3752 //enum class Type : uint8_t
3753 //{
3754 // Undefined = 0,
3755 // Object = 1,
3756 // Ellipse = 2,
3757 // Rectangle = 3,
3758 // Point = 4,
3759 // Polygon = 5,
3760 // Polyline = 6,
3761 // Text = 7,
3762 // Template = 8
3763 //};
3764
3765 inline Object() = default;
3766 inline explicit Object(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
3767 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
3768
3769 [[nodiscard]] inline ObjectType getObjectType() const;
3770 [[nodiscard]] inline bool isEllipse() const;
3771 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getGid() const;
3772 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getSize() const;
3773 [[nodiscard]] inline int getId() const;
3774 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
3775 [[nodiscard]] inline bool isPoint() const;
3776 [[nodiscard]] inline float getRotation() const;
3777 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getTemplate() const;
3778 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
3779 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
3780 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
3781 [[nodiscard]] inline bool isVisible() const;
3782 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getPosition() const;
3783
3784 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::Vector2i> &getPolygons() const;
3785 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::Vector2i> &getPolylines() const;
3786 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
3787 [[nodiscard]] inline const Text &getText() const;
3788
3789 template <typename T>
3790 inline T get(const std::string &name);
3791 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
3792
3793 //v1.2.0-stuff
3794 [[nodiscard]] inline TileFlipFlags getFlipFlags() const;
3795 inline bool hasFlipFlags(TileFlipFlags flags);
3796
3797 private:
3798 inline void setObjectTypeByJson(IJson &json);
3799
3800 ObjectType m_objectType = ObjectType::Undefined;
3801 bool m_ellipse {};
3802 uint32_t m_gid {};
3803 tson::Vector2i m_size;
3804 int m_id{};
3805 std::string m_name;
3806 bool m_point {};
3807 std::vector<tson::Vector2i> m_polygon;
3808 std::vector<tson::Vector2i> m_polyline;
3809 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
3810 float m_rotation {};
3811 std::string m_template;
3812 tson::Text m_text;
3813 std::string m_type;
3814 bool m_visible {};
3815 tson::Vector2i m_position;
3816
3817 //v1.2.0-stuff
3818 tson::TileFlipFlags m_flipFlags = TileFlipFlags::None;
3819
3820 tson::Map *m_map {nullptr};
3821 };
3822
3829 template<typename T>
3830 T tson::Object::get(const std::string &name)
3831 {
3832 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
3833 }
3834}
3835
3840tson::Object::Object(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
3841{
3842 parse(json, map);
3843}
3844
3851bool tson::Object::parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
3852{
3853 m_map = map;
3854 bool allFound = true;
3855
3856 if(json.count("ellipse") > 0) m_ellipse = json["ellipse"].get<bool>(); //Optional
3857 if(json.count("gid") > 0)
3858 {
3859 uint32_t gid = json["gid"].get<uint32_t>(); //Optional
3860 if (gid & FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Horizontally;
3861 if (gid & FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Vertically;
3862 if (gid & FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Diagonally;
3863
3864 // Clear flags
3865 gid &= ~(FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG);
3866
3867 m_gid = gid;
3868 }
3869 if(json.count("id") > 0) m_id = json["id"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
3870 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
3871 if(json.count("point") > 0) m_point = json["point"].get<bool>(); //Optional
3872 if(json.count("rotation") > 0) m_rotation = json["rotation"].get<float>(); else allFound = false;
3873 if(json.count("template") > 0) m_template = json["template"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
3874
3875 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>();
3876 else if(json.count("class") > 0) m_type = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Tiled v1.9 renamed 'type' to 'class'
3877 else allFound = false;
3878
3879 if(json.count("visible") > 0) m_visible = json["visible"].get<bool>(); else allFound = false;
3880
3881 if(json.count("width") > 0 && json.count("height") > 0)
3882 m_size = {json["width"].get<int>(), json["height"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
3883 if(json.count("x") > 0 && json.count("y") > 0)
3884 m_position = {json["x"].get<int>(), json["y"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
3885
3886 if(json.count("text") > 0)
3887 {
3888 //Old logic
3889 //bool hasColor = json["text"].count("color") > 0;
3890 //tson::Color c = (hasColor) ? tson::Colori(json["text"]["color"].get<std::string>()) : tson::Colori();
3891 //m_text = {json["text"]["text"].get<std::string>(), json["text"]["wrap"].get<bool>(), c}; //Optional
3892 m_text = tson::Text(json["text"]);
3893 //
3894
3895 }
3896
3897 setObjectTypeByJson(json);
3898
3899 if(m_objectType == ObjectType::Template)
3900 allFound = true; //Just accept anything with this type
3901
3902 //More advanced data
3903 if(json.count("polygon") > 0 && json["polygon"].isArray())
3904 {
3905 auto &polygon = json.array("polygon");
3906 std::for_each(polygon.begin(), polygon.end(),[&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
3907 {
3908 IJson &j = *item;
3909 m_polygon.emplace_back(j["x"].get<int>(), j["y"].get<int>());
3910 });
3911
3912 }
3913
3914 if(json.count("polyline") > 0 && json["polyline"].isArray())
3915 {
3916 auto &polyline = json.array("polyline");
3917 std::for_each(polyline.begin(), polyline.end(),[&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
3918 {
3919 IJson &j = *item;
3920 m_polyline.emplace_back(j["x"].get<int>(), j["y"].get<int>());
3921 });
3922 }
3923
3924 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
3925 {
3926 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
3927 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
3928 {
3929 m_properties.add(*item);
3930 });
3931 }
3932
3933 return allFound;
3934}
3935
3940void tson::Object::setObjectTypeByJson(IJson &json)
3941{
3942 m_objectType = ObjectType::Undefined;
3943 if(m_ellipse)
3944 m_objectType = ObjectType::Ellipse;
3945 else if(m_point)
3946 m_objectType = ObjectType::Point;
3947 else if(json.count("polygon") > 0)
3948 m_objectType = ObjectType::Polygon;
3949 else if(json.count("polyline") > 0)
3950 m_objectType = ObjectType::Polyline;
3951 else if(json.count("text") > 0)
3952 m_objectType = ObjectType::Text;
3953 else if(json.count("gid") > 0)
3954 m_objectType = ObjectType::Object;
3955 else if(json.count("template") > 0)
3956 m_objectType = ObjectType::Template;
3957 else
3958 m_objectType = ObjectType::Rectangle;
3959}
3960
3965
3966tson::ObjectType tson::Object::getObjectType() const
3967{
3968 return m_objectType;
3969}

3978}

4172#ifndef TILESON_RECT_HPP
4173#define TILESON_RECT_HPP
4174
4175namespace tson
4176{
4177 class Rect
4178 {
4179 public:
4180
4181 inline Rect() = default;
4182 inline Rect(int x_, int y_, int width_, int height_);
4183
4184 inline bool operator==(const Rect &rhs) const;
4185 inline bool operator!=(const Rect &rhs) const;
4186
4187 int x{};
4188 int y{};
4189 int width{};
4190 int height{};
4191 };
4192
4193 Rect::Rect(int x_, int y_, int width_, int height_)
4194 {
4195 x = x_;
4196 y = y_;
4197 width = width_;
4198 height = height_;
4199 }
4200
4201 bool Rect::operator==(const Rect &rhs) const
4202 {
4203 return x == rhs.x &&
4204 y == rhs.y &&
4205 width == rhs.width &&
4206 height == rhs.height;
4207 }
4208
4209 bool Rect::operator!=(const Rect &rhs) const
4210 {
4211 return !(rhs == *this);
4212 }
4213}
4214
4215#endif //TILESON_RECT_HPP
4216
4217/*** End of inlined file: Rect.hpp ***/

4315 class Layer
4316 {
4317 public:
4318 inline Layer() = default;
4319 inline Layer(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
4320 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map); //Defined in tileson_forward
4321
4322 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getCompression() const;
4323 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<uint32_t> &getData() const;
4324 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getBase64Data() const;
4325 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getDrawOrder() const;
4326 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getEncoding() const;
4327 [[nodiscard]] inline int getId() const;
4328 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getImage() const;
4329 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
4330 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2f &getOffset() const;
4331 [[nodiscard]] inline float getOpacity() const;
4332 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getSize() const;
4333 [[nodiscard]] inline const Colori &getTransparentColor() const;
4334 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2f &getParallax() const;
4335 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasRepeatX() const;
4336 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasRepeatY() const;
4337
4338 [[nodiscard]] inline LayerType getType() const;
4339 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
4340 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
4341
4342 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getTypeStr() const;
4343 [[nodiscard]] inline bool isVisible() const;
4344 [[nodiscard]] inline int getX() const;
4345 [[nodiscard]] inline int getY() const;
4346
4347 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Chunk> &getChunks();
4348 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Layer> &getLayers();
4349 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Object> &getObjects();
4350 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
4351
4352 inline tson::Object *getObj(int id);
4353 inline tson::Object *firstObj(const std::string &name);
4354 inline std::vector<tson::Object> getObjectsByName(const std::string &name);
4355 inline std::vector<tson::Object> getObjectsByType(tson::ObjectType type);
4356
4357 template <typename T>
4358 inline T get(const std::string &name);
4359 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
4360
4361 inline void assignTileMap(std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile*> *tileMap);
4362 inline void createTileData(const Vector2i &mapSize, bool isInfiniteMap);
4363
4364 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::Tile *> &getTileData() const;
4365 inline tson::Tile * getTileData(int x, int y);
4366
4367 //v1.2.0-stuff
4368 [[nodiscard]] inline const Colori &getTintColor() const;
4369 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::Map *getMap() const;
4370
4371 [[nodiscard]] inline std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::TileObject> &getTileObjects();
4372 inline tson::TileObject * getTileObject(int x, int y);
4373 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::set<uint32_t> &getUniqueFlaggedTiles() const;
4374 inline void resolveFlaggedTiles();
4375
4376 private:
4377 inline void setTypeByString();
4378
4379 std::vector<tson::Chunk> m_chunks;
4380 std::string m_compression;
4381 std::vector<uint32_t> m_data;
4383 std::string m_base64Data;
4385 std::string m_drawOrder;
4386 std::string m_encoding;
4387 int m_id{};
4388 std::string m_image;
4389 std::vector<tson::Layer> m_layers;
4390 std::string m_name;
4391 std::vector<tson::Object> m_objects;
4392 tson::Vector2f m_offset;
4394 float m_opacity{};
4395 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
4396 tson::Vector2i m_size;
4398 tson::Colori m_transparentColor;
4399 std::string m_typeStr;
4400 LayerType m_type {LayerType::Undefined};
4401 bool m_visible{};
4402 int m_x{};
4403 int m_y{};
4404 tson::Vector2f m_parallax{1.f, 1.f};
4406 bool m_repeatX {};
4407 bool m_repeatY {};
4408
4409 std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile*> *m_tileMap;
4410 std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::Tile*> m_tileData;
4411
4412 //v1.2.0-stuff
4413 tson::Colori m_tintColor;
4415 inline void decompressData();
4416 inline void queueFlaggedTile(size_t x, size_t y, uint32_t id);
4417
4418 tson::Map * m_map;
4419 std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::TileObject> m_tileObjects;
4420 std::set<uint32_t> m_uniqueFlaggedTiles;
4421 std::vector<tson::FlaggedTile> m_flaggedTiles;
4422
4423 std::string m_classType{};
4424
4425 };
4426
4433 template<typename T>
4434 T Layer::get(const std::string &name)
4435 {
4436 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
4437 }
4438}
4439
4444tson::Layer::Layer(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
4445{
4446 parse(json, map);
4447}
4448
4449void tson::Layer::queueFlaggedTile(size_t x, size_t y, uint32_t id)
4450{
4451 uint32_t tileId = id;
4452 tileId &= ~(FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG);
4453 m_uniqueFlaggedTiles.insert(id);
4454 m_flaggedTiles.emplace_back(x, y, id, tileId);
4455}
4456
4462std::vector<tson::Object> tson::Layer::getObjectsByName(const std::string &name)
4463{
4464 std::vector<tson::Object> found;
4465
4466 std::copy_if(m_objects.begin(), m_objects.end(), std::back_inserter(found), [&](const tson::Object &item)
4467 {
4468 return item.getName() == name;
4469 });
4470
4471 return found;
4472}
4473
4479std::vector<tson::Object> tson::Layer::getObjectsByType(tson::ObjectType type)
4480{
4481 std::vector<tson::Object> found;
4482
4483 std::copy_if(m_objects.begin(), m_objects.end(), std::back_inserter(found), [&](const tson::Object &item)
4484 {
4485 return item.getObjectType() == type;
4486 });
4487
4488 return found;
4489}
4490
4496tson::Object *tson::Layer::firstObj(const std::string &name)
4497{
4498 auto result = std::find_if(m_objects.begin(), m_objects.end(), [&](const tson::Object &obj){return obj.getName() == name; });
4499 if(result == m_objects.end())
4500 return nullptr;
4501
4502 return &result.operator*();
4503}
4504
4510tson::Object *tson::Layer::getObj(int id)
4511{
4512 auto result = std::find_if(m_objects.begin(), m_objects.end(), [&](const tson::Object &obj){return obj.getId() == id; });
4513 if(result == m_objects.end())
4514 return nullptr;
4515
4516 return &result.operator*();
4517}
4518
4523void tson::Layer::setTypeByString()
4524{
4525 if(m_typeStr == "tilelayer") m_type = LayerType::TileLayer;
4526 else if(m_typeStr == "objectgroup") m_type = LayerType::ObjectGroup;
4527 else if(m_typeStr == "imagelayer") m_type = LayerType::ImageLayer;
4528 else if(m_typeStr == "group") m_type = LayerType::Group;
4529 else m_type = LayerType::Undefined;
4530}

4738void tson::Layer::assignTileMap(std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile *> *tileMap)

4753const std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::Tile *> &tson::Layer::getTileData() const
4754{
4755 return m_tileData;
4756}
4757
4770tson::Tile *tson::Layer::getTileData(int x, int y)
4771{
4772 return (m_tileData.count({x, y}) > 0) ? m_tileData[{x,y}] : nullptr;
4773}
4774
4779tson::Map *tson::Layer::getMap() const
4780{
4781 return m_map;
4782}
4783
4791void tson::Layer::createTileData(const Vector2i &mapSize, bool isInfiniteMap)
4792{
4793 size_t x = 0;
4794 size_t y = 0;
4795 if(!isInfiniteMap)
4796 {
4797 std::for_each(m_data.begin(), m_data.end(), [&](uint32_t tileId)
4798 {
4799 if (x == mapSize.x)
4800 {
4801 ++y;
4802 x = 0;
4803 }
4804
4805 if (tileId > 0 && m_tileMap->count(tileId) > 0)
4806 {
4807 m_tileData[{static_cast<int>(x), static_cast<int>(y)}] = m_tileMap->at(tileId);
4808 m_tileObjects[{static_cast<int>(x), static_cast<int>(y)}] = {{static_cast<int>(x), static_cast<int>(y)}, m_tileData[{static_cast<int>(x), static_cast<int>(y)}]};
4809 }
4810 else if(tileId > 0 && m_tileMap->count(tileId) == 0) //Tile with flip flags!
4811 {
4812 queueFlaggedTile(x, y, tileId);
4813 }
4814 x++;
4815 });
4816
4817 }
4818}
4819
4820std::map<std::tuple<int, int>, tson::TileObject> &tson::Layer::getTileObjects()
4821{
4822 return m_tileObjects;
4823}
4824
4825tson::TileObject *tson::Layer::getTileObject(int x, int y)
4826{
4827 return (m_tileObjects.count({x, y}) > 0) ? &m_tileObjects[{x,y}] : nullptr;
4828}
4829
4830const std::set<uint32_t> &tson::Layer::getUniqueFlaggedTiles() const
4831{
4832 return m_uniqueFlaggedTiles;
4833}
4834
4835void tson::Layer::resolveFlaggedTiles()
4836{
4837 std::for_each(m_flaggedTiles.begin(), m_flaggedTiles.end(), [&](const tson::FlaggedTile &tile)
4838 {
4839 if (tile.id > 0 && m_tileMap->count(tile.id) > 0)
4840 {
4841 m_tileData[{static_cast<int>(tile.x), static_cast<int>(tile.y)}] = m_tileMap->at(tile.id);
4842 m_tileObjects[{static_cast<int>(tile.x), static_cast<int>(tile.y)}] = {{static_cast<int>(tile.x), static_cast<int>(tile.y)}, m_tileData[{static_cast<int>(tile.x), static_cast<int>(tile.y)}]};
4843 }
4844 });
4845}
4846
4852const tson::Colori &tson::Layer::getTintColor() const
4853{
4854 return m_tintColor;
4855}
4856
4862const tson::Vector2f &tson::Layer::getParallax() const
4863{
4864 return m_parallax;
4865}
4866
4872bool tson::Layer::hasRepeatX() const
4873{
4874 return m_repeatX;
4875}
4876
4882bool tson::Layer::hasRepeatY() const
4883{
4884 return m_repeatY;
4885}
4886
4887const std::string &tson::Layer::getClassType() const
4888{
4889 return m_classType;
4890}

4901
4902#ifndef TILESON_TILESET_HPP
4903#define TILESON_TILESET_HPP
4904
4905//#include "../external/json.hpp"
4906
4907
4908/*** Start of inlined file: Transformations.hpp ***/
4909//
4910// Created by robin on 04.04.2021.
4911//
4912
4913#ifndef TILESON_TRANSFORMATIONS_HPP
4914#define TILESON_TRANSFORMATIONS_HPP
4915
4916namespace tson
4917{
4918 class Transformations
4919 {
4920 public:
4921 inline Transformations() = default;
4922 inline explicit Transformations(IJson &json);
4923 inline bool parse(IJson &json);
4924
4925 inline bool allowHflip() const;
4926 inline bool allowPreferuntransformed() const;
4927 inline bool allowRotation() const;
4928 inline bool allowVflip() const;
4929
4930 private:
4931 bool m_hflip {};
4932 bool m_preferuntransformed {};
4933 bool m_rotate {};
4934 bool m_vflip {};
4935 };
4936
4937 Transformations::Transformations(IJson &json)
4938 {
4939 parse(json);
4940 }
4941
4942 bool Transformations::parse(IJson &json)
4943 {
4944 if(json.count("hflip") > 0) m_hflip = json["hflip"].get<bool>(); //Optional
4945 if(json.count("preferuntransformed") > 0) m_preferuntransformed = json["preferuntransformed"].get<bool>(); //Optional
4946 if(json.count("rotate") > 0) m_rotate = json["rotate"].get<bool>(); //Optional
4947 if(json.count("vflip") > 0) m_vflip = json["vflip"].get<bool>(); //Optional
4948
4949 return true;
4950 }
4951
4956 bool Transformations::allowHflip() const
4957 {
4958 return m_hflip;
4959 }
4960
4965 bool Transformations::allowPreferuntransformed() const
4966 {
4967 return m_preferuntransformed;
4968 }
4969
4974 bool Transformations::allowRotation() const
4975 {
4976 return m_rotate;
4977 }
4978
4983 bool Transformations::allowVflip() const
4984 {
4985 return m_vflip;
4986 }
4987}
4988
4989#endif //TILESON_TRANSFORMATIONS_HPP
4990

5004/*** Start of inlined file: WangColor.hpp ***/
5005//
5006// Created by robin on 22.03.2020.
5007//
5008
5009#ifndef TILESON_WANGCOLOR_HPP
5010#define TILESON_WANGCOLOR_HPP
5011
5012//#include "../external/json.hpp"
5013
5014namespace tson
5015{
5016 class WangColor
5017 {
5018 public:
5019 inline WangColor() = default;
5020 inline explicit WangColor(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
5021 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
5022
5023 [[nodiscard]] inline const Colori &getColor() const;
5024 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
5025 [[nodiscard]] inline float getProbability() const;
5026 [[nodiscard]] inline int getTile() const;
5027
5028 inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
5029 template <typename T>
5030 inline T get(const std::string &name);
5031 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
5032
5033 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
5034 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
5035
5036 private:
5037 tson::Colori m_color;
5038 std::string m_name;
5039 float m_probability{};
5040 int m_tile{};
5041
5042 //New in Tiled v1.5
5043 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
5044 tson::Map * m_map;
5045 std::string m_classType {};
5046
5047 };
5048}
5049
5050tson::WangColor::WangColor(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
5051{
5052 parse(json, map);
5053}
5054
5055bool tson::WangColor::parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
5056{
5057 m_map = map;
5058 bool allFound = true;
5059
5060 if(json.count("color") > 0) m_color = tson::Colori(json["color"].get<std::string>()); else allFound = false;
5061 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
5062 if(json.count("probability") > 0) m_probability = json["probability"].get<float>(); else allFound = false;
5063 if(json.count("tile") > 0) m_tile = json["tile"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
5064 if(json.count("class") > 0) m_classType = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
5065
5066 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
5067 {
5068 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
5069 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item); });
5070 }
5071
5072 return allFound;
5073}
5074
5079const tson::Colori &tson::WangColor::getColor() const
5080{
5081 return m_color;
5082}
5083
5088const std::string &tson::WangColor::getName() const
5089{
5090 return m_name;
5091}
5092
5097float tson::WangColor::getProbability() const
5098{
5099 return m_probability;
5100}
5101
5106int tson::WangColor::getTile() const
5107{
5108 return m_tile;
5109}
5110
5116tson::PropertyCollection &tson::WangColor::getProperties()
5117{
5118 return m_properties;
5119}
5120
5127template<typename T>
5128T tson::WangColor::get(const std::string &name)
5129{
5130 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
5131}
5132
5138tson::Property *tson::WangColor::getProp(const std::string &name)
5139{
5140 if(m_properties.hasProperty(name))
5141 return m_properties.getProperty(name);
5142
5143 return nullptr;
5144}
5145
5146const std::string &tson::WangColor::getClassType() const
5147{
5148 return m_classType;
5149}
5150
5151#endif //TILESON_WANGCOLOR_HPP
5152
5153/*** End of inlined file: WangColor.hpp ***/
5154
5155
5156
5157/*** Start of inlined file: WangTile.hpp ***/
5158//
5159// Created by robin on 22.03.2020.
5160//
5161
5162#ifndef TILESON_WANGTILE_HPP
5163#define TILESON_WANGTILE_HPP
5164
5165//#include "../external/json.hpp"
5166
5167namespace tson
5168{
5169 class WangTile
5170 {
5171 public:
5172 inline WangTile() = default;
5173 inline explicit WangTile(IJson &json);
5174 inline bool parse(IJson &json);
5175
5176 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasDFlip() const;
5177 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasHFlip() const;
5178 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getTileid() const;
5179 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasVFlip() const;
5180
5181 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<uint32_t> &getWangIds() const;
5182
5183 private:
5184 bool m_dflip{};
5185 bool m_hflip{};
5186 uint32_t m_tileid{};
5187 bool m_vflip{};
5188 std::vector<uint32_t> m_wangId;
5189 };
5190}
5191
5192tson::WangTile::WangTile(IJson &json)
5193{
5194 parse(json);
5195}
5196
5202bool tson::WangTile::parse(IJson &json)
5203{
5204 bool allFound = true;
5205
5206 if(json.count("dflip") > 0) m_dflip = json["dflip"].get<bool>(); //Removed in Tiled v1.5 and is now optional
5207 if(json.count("hflip") > 0) m_hflip = json["hflip"].get<bool>(); //Removed in Tiled v1.5 and is now optional
5208 if(json.count("vflip") > 0) m_vflip = json["vflip"].get<bool>(); //Removed in Tiled v1.5 and is now optional
5209
5210 if(json.count("tileid") > 0) m_tileid = json["tileid"].get<uint32_t>(); else allFound = false;
5211 if(json.count("wangid") > 0 && json["wangid"].isArray())
5212 {
5213 auto &wangid = json.array("wangid");
5214 std::for_each(wangid.begin(), wangid.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_wangId.emplace_back(item->get<uint32_t>()); });
5215 }
5216
5217 return allFound;
5218}
5219
5226bool tson::WangTile::hasDFlip() const
5227{
5228 return m_dflip;
5229}
5230
5237bool tson::WangTile::hasHFlip() const
5238{
5239 return m_hflip;
5240}
5241
5246uint32_t tson::WangTile::getTileid() const
5247{
5248 return m_tileid;
5249}
5250
5257bool tson::WangTile::hasVFlip() const
5258{
5259 return m_vflip;
5260}
5261
5266const std::vector<uint32_t> &tson::WangTile::getWangIds() const
5267{
5268 return m_wangId;
5269}
5270
5271#endif //TILESON_WANGTILE_HPP
5272
5273/*** End of inlined file: WangTile.hpp ***/
5274
5275namespace tson
5276{
5277 class WangSet
5278 {
5279 public:
5280 inline WangSet() = default;
5281 inline explicit WangSet(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
5282 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
5283
5284 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
5285 [[nodiscard]] inline int getTile() const;
5286
5287 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::WangTile> &getWangTiles() const;
5288 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &getCornerColors() const;
5289 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &getEdgeColors() const;
5290
5291 inline tson::WangColor * getColor(const std::string &name);
5292 inline const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &getColors() const;
5293 inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
5294
5295 template <typename T>
5296 inline T get(const std::string &name);
5297 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
5298
5299 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
5300 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
5301
5302 private:
5303
5304 inline bool parseTiled15Props(IJson &json);
5305
5306 std::string m_name;
5307 int m_tile{};
5308 std::vector<tson::WangTile> m_wangTiles;
5309 std::vector<tson::WangColor> m_cornerColors;
5310 std::vector<tson::WangColor> m_edgeColors;
5311 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
5312
5313 //Tiled v1.5
5314 std::vector<tson::WangColor> m_colors;
5315
5316 tson::Map * m_map;
5317 std::string m_classType {};
5318
5319 };
5320
5327 template<typename T>
5328 T tson::WangSet::get(const std::string &name)
5329 {
5330 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
5331 }
5332}
5333
5334tson::WangSet::WangSet(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
5335{
5336 parse(json, map);
5337}
5338
5339bool tson::WangSet::parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
5340{
5341 m_map = map;
5342 bool allFound = true;
5343
5344 if(json.count("tile") > 0) m_tile = json["tile"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
5345 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
5346
5347 //More advanced data
5348 if(json.count("wangtiles") > 0 && json["wangtiles"].isArray())
5349 {
5350 auto &wangtiles = json.array("wangtiles");
5351 std::for_each(wangtiles.begin(), wangtiles.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_wangTiles.emplace_back(*item); });
5352 }
5353 if(json.count("cornercolors") > 0 && json["cornercolors"].isArray())
5354 {
5355 auto &cornercolors = json.array("cornercolors");
5356 std::for_each(cornercolors.begin(), cornercolors.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_cornerColors.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
5357 }
5358 if(json.count("edgecolors") > 0 && json["edgecolors"].isArray())
5359 {
5360 auto &edgecolors = json.array("edgecolors");
5361 std::for_each(edgecolors.begin(), edgecolors.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_edgeColors.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
5362 }
5363 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
5364 {
5365 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
5366 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item); });
5367 }
5368
5369 if(json.count("class") > 0) m_classType = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
5370
5371 if(!parseTiled15Props(json))
5372 allFound = false;
5373
5374 return allFound;
5375}
5376
5382
5383bool tson::WangSet::parseTiled15Props(tson::IJson &json)
5384{
5385 if(json.count("colors") > 0 && json["colors"].isArray())
5386 {
5387 auto &colors = json.array("colors");
5388 std::for_each(colors.begin(), colors.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_colors.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
5389 }
5390 return true;
5391}
5392
5397const std::string &tson::WangSet::getName() const
5398{
5399 return m_name;
5400}
5401
5406int tson::WangSet::getTile() const
5407{
5408 return m_tile;
5409}
5410
5415const std::vector<tson::WangTile> &tson::WangSet::getWangTiles() const
5416{
5417 return m_wangTiles;
5418}
5419
5424const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &tson::WangSet::getCornerColors() const
5425{
5426 return m_cornerColors;
5427}
5428
5433const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &tson::WangSet::getEdgeColors() const
5434{
5435 return m_edgeColors;
5436}
5437
5442tson::PropertyCollection &tson::WangSet::getProperties()
5443{
5444 return m_properties;
5445}
5446
5452tson::Property *tson::WangSet::getProp(const std::string &name)
5453{
5454 if(m_properties.hasProperty(name))
5455 return m_properties.getProperty(name);
5456
5457 return nullptr;
5458}
5459
5464const std::vector<tson::WangColor> &tson::WangSet::getColors() const
5465{
5466 return m_colors;
5467}
5468
5476tson::WangColor *tson::WangSet::getColor(const std::string &name)
5477{
5478 auto color = std::find_if(m_colors.begin(), m_colors.end(), [&](const auto &c) { return c.getName() == name; });
5479
5480 if(color != m_colors.end())
5481 return &color.operator*();
5482
5483 return nullptr;
5484}
5485
5486const std::string &tson::WangSet::getClassType() const
5487{
5488 return m_classType;
5489}
5490
5491#endif //TILESON_WANGSET_HPP
5492
5493/*** End of inlined file: WangSet.hpp ***/
5494

5512#ifndef TILESON_FRAME_HPP
5513#define TILESON_FRAME_HPP
5514
5515//#include "../external/json.hpp"
5516
5517namespace tson
5518{
5519 class Frame
5520 {
5521 public:
5522 inline Frame() = default;
5523 inline Frame(int duration, uint32_t tileId);
5524 inline explicit Frame(IJson &json);
5525
5526 inline bool parse(IJson &json);
5527
5528 [[nodiscard]] inline int getDuration() const;
5529 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getTileId() const;
5530
5531 private:
5532 int m_duration {};
5533 uint32_t m_tileId {};
5534 };
5535}
5536
5542tson::Frame::Frame(int duration, uint32_t tileId) : m_duration {duration}, m_tileId {tileId}
5543{
5544
5545}
5546
5551tson::Frame::Frame(IJson &json)
5552{
5553 parse(json);
5554}
5555
5561bool tson::Frame::parse(IJson &json)
5562{
5563 bool allFound = true;
5564
5565 if(json.count("duration") > 0) m_duration = json["duration"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
5566 if(json.count("tileid") > 0) m_tileId = json["tileid"].get<uint32_t>() + 1; else allFound = false;
5567
5568 return allFound;
5569}
5570
5575int tson::Frame::getDuration() const
5576{
5577 return m_duration;
5578}
5579
5584uint32_t tson::Frame::getTileId() const
5585{

5587}

5594/*** Start of inlined file: Animation.hpp ***/
5595//
5596// Created by robin on 21.05.2021.
5597//
5598
5599#ifndef TILESON_ANIMATION_HPP
5600#define TILESON_ANIMATION_HPP
5601
5602namespace tson
5603{
5604 class Animation
5605 {
5606 public:
5607 inline Animation() = default;
5608 inline Animation(const std::vector<tson::Frame> &frames) : m_frames {frames} {};
5609
5610 inline void update(float timeDeltaMs);
5611 inline void reset();
5612
5613 inline void setFrames(const std::vector<tson::Frame> &frames);
5614 inline void setCurrentFrame(uint32_t currentFrame);
5615 inline void setTimeDelta(float timeDelta);
5616
5617 inline const std::vector<tson::Frame> &getFrames() const;
5618 inline const tson::Frame *getCurrentFrame() const;
5619 inline uint32_t getCurrentFrameNumber() const;
5620 inline uint32_t getCurrentTileId() const;
5621 inline float getTimeDelta() const;
5622
5623 inline bool any() const;
5624 inline size_t size() const;
5625
5626 private:
5627 inline int nextFrame();
5628 std::vector<tson::Frame> m_frames;
5629 uint32_t m_currentFrame {0};
5630 float m_timeDelta {0};
5631 };
5632
5633 const std::vector<tson::Frame> &Animation::getFrames() const
5634 {
5635 return m_frames;
5636 }
5637
5641 void Animation::reset()
5642 {
5643 m_currentFrame = 0;
5644 m_timeDelta = 0.f;
5645 }
5646
5651 const tson::Frame *Animation::getCurrentFrame() const
5652 {
5653 return (m_frames.size() == 0 || m_currentFrame >= m_frames.size()) ? nullptr : &m_frames.at(m_currentFrame);
5654 }
5655
5656 size_t Animation::size() const
5657 {
5658 return m_frames.size();
5659 }
5660
5665 void Animation::update(float timeDeltaMs)
5666 {
5667 const tson::Frame *frame = getCurrentFrame();
5668 if(frame != nullptr)
5669 {
5670 m_timeDelta += timeDeltaMs;
5671 if(m_timeDelta >= frame->getDuration())
5672 {
5673 m_timeDelta = static_cast<float>((int32_t)m_timeDelta % frame->getDuration());
5674 m_currentFrame = nextFrame();
5675 }
5676 }
5677 }
5678
5679 int Animation::nextFrame()
5680 {
5681 return (m_currentFrame+1 >= m_frames.size()) ? 0 : m_currentFrame + 1;
5682 }
5683
5684 float Animation::getTimeDelta() const
5685 {
5686 return m_timeDelta;
5687 }
5688
5689 uint32_t Animation::getCurrentFrameNumber() const
5690 {
5691 return m_currentFrame;
5692 }
5693
5694 uint32_t Animation::getCurrentTileId() const
5695 {
5696 return (getCurrentFrame() != nullptr) ? getCurrentFrame()->getTileId() : 0;
5697 }
5698
5699 void Animation::setFrames(const std::vector<tson::Frame> &frames)
5700 {
5701 m_frames = frames;
5702 }
5703
5704 void Animation::setCurrentFrame(uint32_t currentFrame)
5705 {
5706 m_currentFrame = currentFrame;
5707 }
5708
5709 void Animation::setTimeDelta(float timeDelta)
5710 {
5711 m_timeDelta = timeDelta;
5712 }
5713
5718 bool Animation::any() const
5719 {
5720 return m_frames.size() > 0;
5721 }
5722}
5723
5724#endif //TILESON_ANIMATION_HPP
5725
5726/*** End of inlined file: Animation.hpp ***/
5727
5728namespace tson
5729{
5730 class Tileset;
5731 class TiledClass;
5732
5733 class Tile
5734 {
5735 public:
5736 inline Tile() = default;
5737 inline Tile(IJson &json, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map);
5738 inline Tile(uint32_t id, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map);
5739 inline Tile(uint32_t id, tson::Map *map); //v1.2.0
5740 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map);
5741 inline bool parseId(IJson &json);
5742
5743 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getId() const;
5744 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getImage() const;
5745 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getImageSize() const;
5746 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
5747 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
5748 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
5749
5750 //[[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::Frame> &getAnimation() const;
5751 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::Animation &getAnimation();
5752 [[nodiscard]] inline Layer &getObjectgroup();
5753 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
5754 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<int> &getTerrain() const;
5755
5756 template <typename T>
5757 inline T get(const std::string &name);
5758 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
5759
5760 //v1.2.0-stuff
5761 inline void setProperties(const tson::PropertyCollection &properties);
5762
5763 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::Tileset * getTileset() const;
5764 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::Map * getMap() const;
5765 [[nodiscard]] inline const tson::Rect &getDrawingRect() const;
5766 [[nodiscard]] inline const Rect &getSubRectangle() const;
5767
5768 inline const tson::Vector2f getPosition(const std::tuple<int, int> &tileDataPos);
5769 inline const tson::Vector2i getPositionInTileUnits(const std::tuple<int, int> &tileDataPos);
5770 [[nodiscard]] inline const tson::Vector2i getTileSize() const;
5771
5772 [[nodiscard]] inline TileFlipFlags getFlipFlags() const;
5773 inline bool hasFlipFlags(TileFlipFlags flags);
5774 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getGid() const;
5775
5776 inline void addTilesetAndPerformCalculations(tson::Tileset *tileset); //v1.2.0
5777
5778 private:
5779 tson::Animation m_animation{};
5780 uint32_t m_id {};
5781
5782 fs::path m_image;
5783
5784 tson::Vector2i m_imageSize;
5785 tson::Layer m_objectgroup;
5786 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
5787 std::vector<int> m_terrain;
5788 std::string m_type;
5789
5790 //v1.2.0-stuff
5791 uint32_t m_gid {};
5792 tson::Tileset * m_tileset;
5793 tson::Map * m_map;
5794 tson::Rect m_drawingRect;
5795 tson::Rect m_subRect;
5796 tson::TileFlipFlags m_flipFlags = TileFlipFlags::None;
5797 inline void performDataCalculations();
5798 inline void manageFlipFlagsByIdThenRemoveFlags(uint32_t &id);
5799 friend class Layer;
5800 };
5801
5808 template<typename T>
5809 T tson::Tile::get(const std::string &name)
5810 {
5811 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
5812 }
5813}
5814
5815tson::Tile::Tile(IJson &json, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map)
5816{
5817 parse(json, tileset, map);
5818}
5819
5824tson::Tile::Tile(uint32_t id, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map) : m_id {id}, m_gid {id}
5825{
5826 m_tileset = tileset;
5827 m_map = map;
5828 manageFlipFlagsByIdThenRemoveFlags(m_gid);
5829 performDataCalculations();
5830}
5831
5836tson::Tile::Tile(uint32_t id, tson::Map *map) : m_id {id}, m_gid {id}
5837{
5838 m_map = map;
5839 manageFlipFlagsByIdThenRemoveFlags(m_gid);
5840}
5841
5846void tson::Tile::addTilesetAndPerformCalculations(tson::Tileset *tileset)
5847{
5848 m_tileset = tileset;
5849 performDataCalculations();
5850}
5851
5857bool tson::Tile::parse(IJson &json, tson::Tileset *tileset, tson::Map *map)
5858{
5859 m_tileset = tileset;
5860 m_map = map;
5861
5862 if(json.count("image") > 0) m_image = fs::path(json["image"].get<std::string>()); //Optional
5863
5864 bool allFound = parseId(json);
5865
5866 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
5867 else if(json.count("class") > 0) m_type = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Tiled v1.9 renamed 'type' to 'class'
5868
5869 if(json.count("objectgroup") > 0) m_objectgroup = tson::Layer(json["objectgroup"], m_map); //Optional
5870
5871 if(json.count("imagewidth") > 0 && json.count("imageheight") > 0)
5872 m_imageSize = {json["imagewidth"].get<int>(), json["imageheight"].get<int>()}; //Optional
5873
5874 m_subRect = {0,0, m_imageSize.x, m_imageSize.y};
5875 if(json.count("x") > 0) m_subRect.x = json["x"].get<int>(); //Optional
5876 if(json.count("y") > 0) m_subRect.y = json["y"].get<int>(); //Optional
5877 if(json.count("width") > 0) m_subRect.width = json["width"].get<int>(); //Optional
5878 if(json.count("height") > 0) m_subRect.height = json["height"].get<int>(); //Optional
5879
5880 //More advanced data
5881 if(json.count("animation") > 0 && json["animation"].isArray())
5882 {
5883 auto &animation = json.array("animation");
5884 std::vector<tson::Frame> frames;
5885 std::for_each(animation.begin(), animation.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { frames.emplace_back(*item); });
5886 if(frames.size() > 0)
5887 {
5888 m_animation.setFrames(frames);
5889 }
5890 }
5891 if(json.count("terrain") > 0 && json["terrain"].isArray())
5892 {
5893 auto &terrain = json.array("terrain");
5894 std::for_each(terrain.begin(), terrain.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_terrain.emplace_back(item->get<int>()); });
5895 }
5896
5897 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
5898 {
5899 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
5900 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item); });
5901 }
5902
5903 performDataCalculations();
5904
5905 return allFound;
5906}
5907

6039const tson::Vector2i tson::Tile::getPositionInTileUnits(const std::tuple<int, int> &tileDataPos)

6042}
6043
6044void tson::Tile::manageFlipFlagsByIdThenRemoveFlags(uint32_t &id)
6045{
6046 if (id & FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Horizontally;
6047 if (id & FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Vertically;
6048 if (id & FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG) m_flipFlags |= TileFlipFlags::Diagonally;
6049
6050 id &= ~(FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG | FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG);
6051}
6052
6053tson::TileFlipFlags tson::Tile::getFlipFlags() const
6054{
6055 return m_flipFlags;
6056}
6057
6066bool tson::Tile::hasFlipFlags(tson::TileFlipFlags flags)
6067{
6068 return ((m_flipFlags & flags) == flags) ? true : false;
6069}
6070
6071uint32_t tson::Tile::getGid() const
6072{
6073 return m_gid;
6074}

6077{
6078 m_properties = properties;
6079}

6086{
6087 return m_subRect;
6088}

6100#ifndef TILESON_TERRAIN_HPP
6101#define TILESON_TERRAIN_HPP
6102
6103//#include "../external/json.hpp"
6104
6105namespace tson
6106{
6107 class Terrain
6108 {
6109 public:
6110 inline Terrain() = default;
6111 inline Terrain(std::string name, int tile);
6112 inline explicit Terrain(IJson &json);
6113
6114 inline bool parse(IJson &json);
6115
6116 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
6117 [[nodiscard]] inline int getTile() const;
6118 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
6119
6120 template <typename T>
6121 inline T get(const std::string &name);
6122 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
6123
6124 private:
6125 std::string m_name;
6126 int m_tile {};
6127 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
6128 };
6129
6136 template<typename T>
6137 T tson::Terrain::get(const std::string &name)
6138 {
6139 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
6140 }
6141}
6142
6143tson::Terrain::Terrain(std::string name, int tile) : m_name {std::move(name)}, m_tile {tile}
6144{
6145
6146}
6147
6148tson::Terrain::Terrain(IJson &json)
6149{
6150 parse(json);
6151}
6152
6153bool tson::Terrain::parse(IJson &json)
6154{
6155 bool allFound = true;
6156
6157 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
6158 if(json.count("tile") > 0) m_tile = json["tile"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6159
6160 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
6161 {
6162 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
6163 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item); });
6164 }
6165
6166 return allFound;
6167}
6168
6173const std::string &tson::Terrain::getName() const
6174{
6175 return m_name;
6176}
6177
6182int tson::Terrain::getTile() const
6183{
6184 return m_tile;
6185}
6186
6191tson::PropertyCollection &tson::Terrain::getProperties()
6192{
6193 return m_properties;
6194}
6195
6201tson::Property *tson::Terrain::getProp(const std::string &name)
6202{
6203 if(m_properties.hasProperty(name))
6204 return m_properties.getProperty(name);
6205 return nullptr;
6206}
6207

6227 {

6230 inline explicit Grid(IJson &json);
6231
6232 inline bool parse(IJson &json);
6233
6234 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getOrientation() const;
6235 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getSize() const;

6247tson::Grid::Grid(IJson &json)

6257bool tson::Grid::parse(IJson &json)
6258{
6259 bool allFound = true;
6260
6261 if(json.count("orientation") > 0) m_orientation = json["orientation"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6262
6263 if(json.count("width") > 0 && json.count("height") > 0)
6264 m_size = {json["width"].get<int>(), json["height"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
6265
6266 return allFound;
6267}

6290
6291#include <functional>
6292
6293namespace tson
6294{
6295 class Map;
6296 class Tileset
6297 {
6298 public:
6299 inline Tileset() = default;
6300 inline explicit Tileset(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
6301 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map);
6302
6303 [[nodiscard]] inline int getColumns() const;
6304 [[nodiscard]] inline int getFirstgid() const;
6305
6306 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getImagePath() const;
6307 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getImage() const;
6308 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getImageSize() const;
6309 [[nodiscard]] inline int getMargin() const;
6310 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
6311 [[nodiscard]] inline int getSpacing() const;
6312 [[nodiscard]] inline int getTileCount() const;
6313 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getTileSize() const;
6314 [[nodiscard]] inline const Colori &getTransparentColor() const;
6315 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
6316 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
6317 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
6318 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Tile> &getTiles();
6319 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::WangSet> &getWangsets() const;
6320 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
6321 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<tson::Terrain> &getTerrains() const;
6322 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getTileOffset() const;
6323 [[nodiscard]] inline const Grid &getGrid() const;
6324 [[nodiscard]] inline TileRenderSize getTileRenderSize() const;
6325 [[nodiscard]] inline FillMode getFillMode() const;
6326
6327 inline tson::Tile * getTile(uint32_t id);
6328 inline tson::Terrain * getTerrain(const std::string &name);
6329
6330 template <typename T>
6331 inline T get(const std::string &name);
6332 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
6333
6334 //v1.2.0-stuff
6335 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::Map *getMap() const;
6336 [[nodiscard]] inline ObjectAlignment getObjectAlignment() const;
6337
6338 inline static tson::ObjectAlignment StringToAlignment(std::string_view str);
6339
6340 //v1.3.0
6341 inline tson::Vector2i getMarginSpacingOffset(const tson::Vector2i &posInTileUnits);
6342 inline tson::WangSet * getWangset(const std::string &name);
6343 inline const Transformations &getTransformations() const;
6344
6345 #ifndef TSON_TEST_ENABLED
6346 private:
6347 #endif
6348 inline void generateMissingTiles();
6349
6350 int m_columns {};
6351 int m_firstgid {};
6352
6353 fs::path m_image;
6354
6355 tson::Vector2i m_imageSize;
6356 int m_margin {};
6357 std::string m_name;
6358 int m_spacing {};
6359 int m_tileCount {};
6360 tson::Vector2i m_tileSize;
6361 tson::Colori m_transparentColor;
6362 std::string m_type;
6363
6364 std::vector<tson::Tile> m_tiles;
6365 std::vector<tson::WangSet> m_wangsets;
6366 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
6367
6368 std::vector<tson::Terrain> m_terrains;
6369 tson::Vector2i m_tileOffset;
6370 tson::Grid m_grid;
6372
6373 //v1.2.0-stuff
6374 tson::ObjectAlignment m_objectAlignment{tson::ObjectAlignment::Unspecified};
6375 tson::Map * m_map;
6376
6377 //v1.3.0-stuff
6378 fs::path m_source {};
6379 fs::path m_path {};
6380 Transformations m_transformations {};
6382
6383 //v1.4.0-stuff
6384 TileRenderSize m_tileRenderSize {};
6386 FillMode m_fillMode {};
6388
6389 std::string m_classType {};
6390
6391 };
6392
6399 template<typename T>
6400 T tson::Tileset::get(const std::string &name)
6401 {
6402 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
6403 }
6404}
6405
6406tson::Tileset::Tileset(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
6407{
6408 parse(json, map);
6409}
6410
6411bool tson::Tileset::parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
6412{
6413 m_map = map;
6414 bool allFound = true;
6415
6416 if(json.count("firstgid") > 0) m_firstgid = json["firstgid"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6417
6418 //Tileset is stored in external file if 'source' exists
6419 if(json.count("source") > 0)
6420 {
6421 if(!allFound)
6422 return allFound;
6423
6424 std::string sourceStr = json["source"].get<std::string>();
6425 m_source = fs::path(sourceStr);
6426 m_path = json.directory() / m_source;
6427
6428 if(!json.parse(m_path))
6429 return false;
6430 }
6431
6432 if(json.count("columns") > 0) m_columns = json["columns"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6433
6434 if(json.count("image") > 0) m_image = fs::path(json["image"].get<std::string>()); else allFound = false;
6435
6436 if(json.count("margin") > 0) m_margin = json["margin"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6437 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
6438 if(json.count("spacing") > 0) m_spacing = json["spacing"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6439 if(json.count("tilecount") > 0) m_tileCount = json["tilecount"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6440 if(json.count("transparentcolor") > 0) m_transparentColor = tson::Colori(json["transparentcolor"].get<std::string>()); //Optional
6441 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>();
6442 if(json.count("grid") > 0) m_grid = tson::Grid(json["grid"]);
6443 if(json.count("class") > 0) m_classType = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6444
6445 if(json.count("imagewidth") > 0 && json.count("imageheight") > 0)
6446 m_imageSize = {json["imagewidth"].get<int>(), json["imageheight"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
6447 if(json.count("tilewidth") > 0 && json.count("tileheight") > 0)
6448 m_tileSize = {json["tilewidth"].get<int>(), json["tileheight"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
6449 if(json.count("tileoffset") > 0)
6450 m_tileOffset = {json["tileoffset"]["x"].get<int>(), json["tileoffset"]["y"].get<int>()};
6451
6452 if(json.count("tilerendersize") > 0)
6453 {
6454 std::string tileRenderStr = json["tilerendersize"].get<std::string>();
6455 if(tileRenderStr == "tile") m_tileRenderSize = TileRenderSize::Tile;
6456 else if(tileRenderStr == "grid") m_tileRenderSize = TileRenderSize::Grid;
6457 }
6458
6459 if(json.count("fillmode") > 0)
6460 {
6461 std::string fillmode = json["fillmode"].get<std::string>();
6462 if(fillmode == "stretch") m_fillMode = FillMode::Stretch;
6463 else if(fillmode == "preserve-aspect-fit") m_fillMode = FillMode::PreserveAspectFit;
6464 }
6465
6466 //More advanced data
6467 if(json.count("wangsets") > 0 && json["wangsets"].isArray())
6468 {
6469 auto &wangsets = json.array("wangsets");
6470 std::for_each(wangsets.begin(), wangsets.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_wangsets.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
6471 }
6472 if(json.count("tiles") > 0 && json["tiles"].isArray())
6473 {
6474 auto &tiles = json.array("tiles");
6475 std::for_each(tiles.begin(), tiles.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_tiles.emplace_back(*item, this, m_map); });
6476 }
6477 if(json.count("terrains") > 0 && json["terrains"].isArray())
6478 {
6479 auto &terrains = json.array("terrains");
6480 std::for_each(terrains.begin(), terrains.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_terrains.emplace_back(*item); });
6481 }
6482
6483 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
6484 {
6485 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
6486 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item); });
6487 }
6488
6489 if(json.count("objectalignment") > 0)
6490 {
6491 std::string alignment = json["objectalignment"].get<std::string>();
6492 m_objectAlignment = StringToAlignment(alignment);
6493 }
6494
6495 if(json.count("transformations") > 0)
6496 {
6497 m_transformations.parse(json["transformations"]);
6498 }
6499
6500 generateMissingTiles();
6501
6502 return allFound;
6503}
6504

6510{
6511 return m_columns;
6512}

6613std::vector<tson::Tile> &tson::Tileset::getTiles()
6614{
6615 return m_tiles;

6623{
6624 return m_wangsets;

6631tson::PropertyCollection &tson::Tileset::getProperties()
6632{
6633 return m_properties;

6635
6640const std::vector<tson::Terrain> &tson::Tileset::getTerrains() const
6641{
6642 return m_terrains;

6649const tson::Vector2i &tson::Tileset::getTileOffset() const
6650{

6659const tson::Grid &tson::Tileset::getGrid() const
6660{

6663
6670tson::Tile *tson::Tileset::getTile(uint32_t id)
6671{
6672 auto result = std::find_if(m_tiles.begin(), m_tiles.end(), [&](const tson::Tile & item) { return item.getId() == id;});
6673 if(result == m_tiles.end())
6674 return nullptr;
6675
6676 return &result.operator*();
6677}
6678
6684tson::Terrain *tson::Tileset::getTerrain(const std::string &name)
6685{
6686 auto result = std::find_if(m_terrains.begin(), m_terrains.end(), [&](const tson::Terrain & item) { return item.getName() == name;});
6687 if(result == m_terrains.end())
6688 return nullptr;
6689
6690 return &result.operator*();
6691}
6692
6698tson::Property *tson::Tileset::getProp(const std::string &name)
6699{
6700 if(m_properties.hasProperty(name))
6701 return m_properties.getProperty(name);
6702
6703 return nullptr;
6704}
6705
6709void tson::Tileset::generateMissingTiles()
6710{
6711 std::vector<uint32_t> tileIds;
6712 for(auto &tile : m_tiles)
6713 tileIds.push_back(tile.getId());
6714
6715 for(uint32_t i = m_firstgid; i < m_firstgid + (uint32_t) m_tileCount; ++i)
6716 {
6717 if(std::count(tileIds.begin(), tileIds.end(), i) == 0)
6718 {
6719 m_tiles.emplace_back(Tile(i, this, m_map));
6720 }
6721 }
6722}
6723
6728tson::Map *tson::Tileset::getMap() const
6729{
6730 return m_map;
6731}
6732
6738tson::ObjectAlignment tson::Tileset::StringToAlignment(std::string_view str)
6739{
6740 if(str == "unspecified") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Unspecified;
6741 else if(str == "topleft") return tson::ObjectAlignment::TopLeft;
6742 else if(str == "top") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Top;
6743 else if(str == "topright") return tson::ObjectAlignment::TopRight;
6744 else if(str == "left") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Left;
6745 else if(str == "center") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Center;
6746 else if(str == "right") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Right;
6747 else if(str == "bottomleft") return tson::ObjectAlignment::BottomLeft;
6748 else if(str == "bottom") return tson::ObjectAlignment::Bottom;
6749 else if(str == "bottomright") return tson::ObjectAlignment::BottomRight;
6750 else
6751 return tson::ObjectAlignment::Unspecified;
6752}
6753
6754tson::ObjectAlignment tson::Tileset::getObjectAlignment() const
6755{
6756 return m_objectAlignment;
6757}
6758
6766tson::Vector2i tson::Tileset::getMarginSpacingOffset(const tson::Vector2i &posInTileUnits)
6767{
6768 if(m_margin == 0 && m_spacing == 0)
6769 return {0,0};
6770
6771 tson::Vector2i offset {(posInTileUnits.x * m_spacing) + m_margin, (posInTileUnits.y * m_spacing) + m_margin};
6772 return offset;
6773}
6774
6780tson::WangSet *tson::Tileset::getWangset(const std::string &name)
6781{
6782 auto wangset = std::find_if(m_wangsets.begin(), m_wangsets.end(), [&](const auto &w) { return w.getName() == name; });
6783
6784 if(wangset != m_wangsets.end())
6785 return &wangset.operator*();
6786
6787 return nullptr;
6788}
6789
