6819namespace tson
6820{
6821 class Map
6822 {
6823 public:
6824 inline Map() = default;
6825 inline Map(ParseStatus status, std::string description);
6826 inline explicit Map(IJson &json, tson::DecompressorContainer *decompressors, tson::Project *project);
6827 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::DecompressorContainer *decompressors, tson::Project *project);
6828
6829 [[nodiscard]] inline const Colori &getBackgroundColor() const;
6830 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getSize() const;
6831 [[nodiscard]] inline int getHexsideLength() const;
6832 [[nodiscard]] inline bool isInfinite() const;
6833 [[nodiscard]] inline int getNextLayerId() const;
6834 [[nodiscard]] inline int getNextObjectId() const;
6835 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getOrientation() const;
6836 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getRenderOrder() const;
6837 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getStaggerAxis() const;
6838 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getStaggerIndex() const;
6839 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getTiledVersion() const;
6840 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2i &getTileSize() const;
6841 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
6842 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getClassType() const;
6843 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass *getClass();
6844 [[nodiscard]] inline const Vector2f &getParallaxOrigin() const;
6845 //[[nodiscard]] inline int getVersion() const; //Removed - Tileson v1.3.0
6846
6847 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Layer> &getLayers();
6848 [[nodiscard]] inline PropertyCollection &getProperties();
6849 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<tson::Tileset> &getTilesets();
6850
6851 [[nodiscard]] inline ParseStatus getStatus() const;
6852 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getStatusMessage() const;
6853 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile *> &getTileMap() const;
6854
6855 inline Layer * getLayer(const std::string &name);
6856 inline Tileset * getTileset(const std::string &name);
6857
6858 template <typename T>
6859 inline T get(const std::string &name);
6860 inline tson::Property * getProp(const std::string &name);
6861
6862 //v1.2.0
6863 [[nodiscard]] inline int getCompressionLevel() const;
6864 inline DecompressorContainer *getDecompressors();
6865 inline Project * getProject();
6866 inline Tileset * getTilesetByGid(uint32_t gid);
6867
6868 private:
6869 inline bool createTilesetData(IJson &json);
6870 inline void processData();
6871
6872 Colori m_backgroundColor; ;
6873 Vector2i m_size;
6874 int m_hexsideLength {};
6875 bool m_isInfinite {};
6876 std::vector<tson::Layer> m_layers;
6877 int m_nextLayerId {};
6878 int m_nextObjectId {};
6879 std::string m_orientation;
6880 tson::PropertyCollection m_properties;
6881 std::string m_renderOrder;
6882 std::string m_staggerAxis;
6883 std::string m_staggerIndex;
6884 std::string m_tiledVersion;
6885 Vector2i m_tileSize;
6886 std::vector<tson::Tileset> m_tilesets;
6887 std::string m_type;
6888 tson::Vector2f m_parallaxOrigin;
6890
6891 ParseStatus m_status {ParseStatus::OK};
6892 std::string m_statusMessage {"OK"};
6893
6894 std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile*> m_tileMap{};
6895
6896 //v1.2.0
6897 int m_compressionLevel {-1};
6900 tson::DecompressorContainer * m_decompressors {nullptr};
6901 tson::Project * m_project {nullptr};
6902 std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile> m_flaggedTileMap{};
6903
6904 std::string m_classType{};
6905 };
6906
6913 template<typename T>
6914 T tson::Map::get(const std::string &name)
6915 {
6916 return m_properties.getValue<T>(name);
6917 }
6918}
6919
6925tson::Map::Map(tson::ParseStatus status, std::string description) : m_status {status}, m_statusMessage { std::move(description) }
6926{
6927
6928}
6929
6935tson::Map::Map(IJson &json, tson::DecompressorContainer *decompressors, tson::Project *project)
6936{
6937 parse(json, decompressors, project);
6938}
6939
6945bool tson::Map::parse(IJson &json, tson::DecompressorContainer *decompressors, tson::Project *project)
6946{
6947 m_decompressors = decompressors;
6948 m_project = project;
6949
6950 bool allFound = true;
6951 if(json.count("compressionlevel") > 0)
6952 m_compressionLevel = json["compressionlevel"].get<int>(); //Tiled 1.3 - Optional
6953
6954 if(json.count("backgroundcolor") > 0) m_backgroundColor = Colori(json["backgroundcolor"].get<std::string>()); //Optional
6955 if(json.count("width") > 0 && json.count("height") > 0 )
6956 m_size = {json["width"].get<int>(), json["height"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
6957 if(json.count("hexsidelength") > 0) m_hexsideLength = json["hexsidelength"].get<int>(); //Optional
6958 if(json.count("infinite") > 0) m_isInfinite = json["infinite"].get<bool>(); //Optional
6959 if(json.count("nextlayerid") > 0) m_nextLayerId = json["nextlayerid"].get<int>(); //Optional
6960 if(json.count("nextobjectid") > 0) m_nextObjectId = json["nextobjectid"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6961 if(json.count("orientation") > 0) m_orientation = json["orientation"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
6962 if(json.count("renderorder") > 0) m_renderOrder = json["renderorder"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6963 if(json.count("staggeraxis") > 0) m_staggerAxis = json["staggeraxis"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6964 if(json.count("staggerindex") > 0) m_staggerIndex = json["staggerindex"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6965 if(json.count("tiledversion") > 0) m_tiledVersion = json["tiledversion"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
6966 if(json.count("tilewidth") > 0 && json.count("tileheight") > 0 )
6967 m_tileSize = {json["tilewidth"].get<int>(), json["tileheight"].get<int>()}; else allFound = false;
6968 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6969 if(json.count("class") > 0) m_classType = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
6970
6971 //Removed - Changed from a float to string in Tiled v1.6, and old spec said int.
6972 //Reason for removal is that it seems to have no real use, as TiledVersion is stored in another variable.
6973 //if(json.count("version") > 0) m_version = json["version"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
6974
6975 //More advanced data
6976 if(json.count("layers") > 0 && json["layers"].isArray())
6977 {
6978 auto &array = json.array("layers");
6979 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
6980 {
6981 m_layers.emplace_back(*item, this);
6982 });
6983 }
6984
6985 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
6986 {
6987 auto &array = json.array("properties");
6988 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
6989 {
6990 m_properties.add(*item, m_project);
6991 });
6992 }
6993
6994 tson::Vector2f parallaxOrigin {0.f, 0.f};
6995 if(json.count("parallaxoriginx") > 0)
6996 parallaxOrigin.x = json["parallaxoriginx"].get<float>();
6997 if(json.count("parallaxoriginy") > 0)
6998 parallaxOrigin.y = json["parallaxoriginy"].get<float>();
6999
7000 m_parallaxOrigin = parallaxOrigin;
7001
7002 if(!createTilesetData(json))
7003 allFound = false;
7004
7005 processData();
7006
7007 return allFound;
7008}
7009
7013bool tson::Map::createTilesetData(IJson &json)
7014{
7015 bool ok = true;
7016 if(json.count("tilesets") > 0 && json["tilesets"].isArray())
7017 {
7018 //First created tileset objects
7019 auto &tilesets = json.array("tilesets");
7020 std::for_each(tilesets.begin(), tilesets.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
7021 {
7022 m_tilesets.emplace_back();
7023 });
7024
7025 int i = 0;
7026 //Then do the parsing
7027 std::for_each(tilesets.begin(), tilesets.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
7028 {
7029 item->directory(json.directory());
7030 if(!m_tilesets[i].parse(*item, this))
7031 ok = false;
7032
7033 ++i;
7034 });
7035 }
7036 return ok;
7037}
7038
7042void tson::Map::processData()
7043{
7044 m_tileMap.clear();
7045 for(auto &tileset : m_tilesets)
7046 {
7047 std::set<std::uint32_t> usedIds;
7048 for(auto& tile : tileset.getTiles())
7049 {
7050 if (usedIds.count(tile.getGid()) != 0)
7051 {
7052 continue;
7053 }
7054 usedIds.insert(tile.getGid());
7055 m_tileMap[tile.getGid()] = &tile;
7056 }
7057 }
7058 std::for_each(m_layers.begin(), m_layers.end(), [&](tson::Layer &layer)
7059 {
7060 layer.assignTileMap(&m_tileMap);
7061 layer.createTileData(m_size, m_isInfinite);
7062 const std::set<uint32_t> &flaggedTiles = layer.getUniqueFlaggedTiles();
7063 for(uint32_t ftile : flaggedTiles)
7064 {
7065 tson::Tile tile {ftile, layer.getMap()};
7066 if(m_tileMap.count(tile.getGid()))
7067 {
7068 tson::Tile *originalTile = m_tileMap[tile.getGid()];
7069 tile.addTilesetAndPerformCalculations(originalTile->getTileset());
7070 tile.setProperties(originalTile->getProperties());
7071 m_flaggedTileMap[ftile] = tile;
7072 m_tileMap[ftile] = &m_flaggedTileMap[ftile];
7073 }
7074 }
7075 layer.resolveFlaggedTiles();
7076 });
7077}
7078

7231
7232tson::Layer *tson::Map::getLayer(const std::string &name)
7233{
7234 auto result = std::find_if(m_layers.begin(), m_layers.end(), [&](const tson::Layer &item) { return item.getName() == name; });
7235 if(result == m_layers.end())
7236 return nullptr;
7237
7238 return &result.operator*();
7239}
7240
7247tson::Tileset *tson::Map::getTileset(const std::string &name)
7248{
7249 auto result = std::find_if(m_tilesets.begin(), m_tilesets.end(), [&](const tson::Tileset &item) {return item.getName() == name; });
7250 if(result == m_tilesets.end())
7251 return nullptr;
7252
7253 return &result.operator*();
7254}
7255
7262tson::Tileset *tson::Map::getTilesetByGid(uint32_t gid)
7263{
7264 auto result = std::find_if(m_tilesets.begin(), m_tilesets.end(), [&](const tson::Tileset &tileset)
7265 {
7266 auto const firstId = static_cast<uint32_t>(tileset.getFirstgid()); //First tile id of the tileset
7267 auto const lastId = static_cast<uint32_t>((firstId + tileset.getTileCount()) - 1);
7268
7269 return (gid >= firstId && gid <= lastId);
7270 });
7271 if(result == m_tilesets.end())
7272 return nullptr;
7273
7274 return &result.operator*();
7275}
7276
7282tson::Property *tson::Map::getProp(const std::string &name)
7283{
7284 if(m_properties.hasProperty(name))
7285 return m_properties.getProperty(name);
7286 return nullptr;
7287}
7288
7289tson::ParseStatus tson::Map::getStatus() const
7290{
7291 return m_status;
7292}
7293
7294const std::string &tson::Map::getStatusMessage() const
7295{
7296 return m_statusMessage;
7297}
7298
7303const std::map<uint32_t, tson::Tile *> &tson::Map::getTileMap() const
7304{
7305 return m_tileMap;
7306}

7308tson::DecompressorContainer *tson::Map::getDecompressors()
7309{
7310 return m_decompressors;
7311}

7347
7348/*** Start of inlined file: TiledEnum.hpp ***/
7349//
7350// Created by robin on 06.06.22.
7351//
7352
7353#ifndef TILESON_TILEDENUM_HPP
7354#define TILESON_TILEDENUM_HPP
7355
7356namespace tson
7357{
7358 class EnumDefinition
7359 {
7360 public:
7361 inline explicit EnumDefinition(IJson &json);
7362 inline uint32_t getValue(const std::string &str);
7363 inline std::string getValue(uint32_t num);
7364 inline std::vector<std::string> getValues(uint32_t num);
7365 inline bool exists(const std::string &str);
7366 inline bool exists(uint32_t num);
7367
7368 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getId() const;
7369 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getMaxValue() const;
7370 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
7371 [[nodiscard]] inline EnumStorageType getStorageType() const;
7372 [[nodiscard]] inline bool hasValuesAsFlags() const;
7373
7374 private:
7375 inline bool hasFlag(uint32_t value, uint32_t flag) const;
7376 uint32_t m_id {};
7377 uint32_t m_maxValue {};
7378 std::string m_name {};
7379 std::map<uint32_t, std::string> m_values {};
7380 bool m_valuesAsFlags {false};
7381 EnumStorageType m_storageType { EnumStorageType::Unspecified };
7382 };
7383
7384 EnumDefinition::EnumDefinition(IJson &json)
7385 {
7386 m_id = json.get<uint32_t>("id");
7387 m_name = json.get<std::string>("name");
7388 std::string type = json.get<std::string>("storageType");
7389 m_storageType = (type == "int") ? EnumStorageType::Int : (type == "string") ? EnumStorageType::String : EnumStorageType::Unspecified;
7390 m_valuesAsFlags = json.get<bool>("valuesAsFlags");
7391
7392 if(json.count("values") > 0 && json["values"].isArray())
7393 {
7394 m_values[0] = "None";
7395 uint32_t valueCounter = (m_valuesAsFlags) ? 1 : 0;
7396 uint8_t flagBit = 1;
7397 auto &array = json.array("values");
7398 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
7399 {
7400 std::string v = item->get<std::string>();
7401 m_values[valueCounter] = v;
7402 if(m_valuesAsFlags)
7403 {
7404 valueCounter = 1 << flagBit;
7405 ++flagBit;
7406 }
7407 else
7408 {
7409 ++valueCounter;
7410 }
7411 });
7412
7413 m_maxValue = valueCounter;
7414 }
7415 }
7416
7417 uint32_t EnumDefinition::getValue(const std::string &str)
7418 {
7419 auto result = std::find_if(m_values.begin(), m_values.end(), [&](const std::pair<uint32_t, std::string> &pair)
7420 {
7421 return pair.second == str;
7422 });
7423
7424 if(result != m_values.end())
7425 return result->first;
7426
7427 return 0;
7428 }
7429
7430 std::string EnumDefinition::getValue(uint32_t num)
7431 {
7432 return (m_values.count(num) > 0) ? m_values[num] : "";
7433 }
7434
7435 bool EnumDefinition::hasValuesAsFlags() const
7436 {
7437 return m_valuesAsFlags;
7438 }
7439
7440 bool EnumDefinition::exists(const std::string &str)
7441 {
7442 auto result = std::find_if(m_values.begin(), m_values.end(), [&](const std::pair<uint32_t, std::string> &pair)
7443 {
7444 return pair.second == str;
7445 });
7446
7447 if(result != m_values.end())
7448 return true;
7449
7450 return false;
7451 }
7452
7453 bool EnumDefinition::exists(uint32_t num) { return (m_values.count(num) > 0); }
7454
7455 uint32_t EnumDefinition::getId() const
7456 {
7457 return m_id;
7458 }
7459
7460 const std::string &EnumDefinition::getName() const
7461 {
7462 return m_name;
7463 }
7464
7465 EnumStorageType EnumDefinition::getStorageType() const
7466 {
7467 return m_storageType;
7468 }
7469
7470 uint32_t EnumDefinition::getMaxValue() const
7471 {
7472 return m_maxValue;
7473 }
7474
7475 std::vector<std::string> EnumDefinition::getValues(uint32_t num)
7476 {
7477 std::vector<std::string> values;
7478 if(m_valuesAsFlags)
7479 {
7480 uint32_t flag = 0;
7481 uint32_t i = 0;
7482 while(flag < m_maxValue)
7483 {
7484 flag = 1 << i;
7485 ++i;
7486 if(m_values.count(flag) > 0 && hasFlag(num, flag))
7487 {
7488 values.emplace_back(m_values[flag]);
7489 }
7490 }
7491 }
7492 else
7493 {
7494 std::string v = getValue(num);
7495 if(!v.empty())
7496 values.emplace_back();
7497 }
7498
7499 return values;
7500 }
7501
7502 bool EnumDefinition::hasFlag(uint32_t value, uint32_t flag) const
7503 {
7504 return ((value & flag) == flag);
7505 }
7506
7507 class EnumValue
7508 {
7509 public:
7510 inline EnumValue() = default;
7511 inline EnumValue(uint32_t value, EnumDefinition *definition);
7512 inline EnumValue(const std::string &value, EnumDefinition *definition);
7513
7514 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getValue() const;
7515 inline std::string getValueName() const;
7516 [[nodiscard]] inline std::vector<std::string> getValueNames() const;
7517 [[nodiscard]] inline EnumDefinition *getDefinition() const;
7518
7519 inline bool hasFlagValue(uint32_t flag) const;
7520 template <typename T>
7521 inline bool hasFlag(T flags) const;
7522 inline bool hasAnyFlagValue(uint32_t flags) const;
7523 template <typename T>
7524 inline bool hasAnyFlag(T flags) const;
7525 [[nodiscard]] inline bool containsValueName(const std::string &value) const;
7526
7527 private:
7528 uint32_t m_value {0};
7529 EnumDefinition *m_definition = nullptr;
7530 };
7531
7532 EnumValue::EnumValue(uint32_t value, EnumDefinition *definition) : m_value {value}, m_definition {definition}
7533 {
7534
7535 }
7536
7537 EnumValue::EnumValue(const std::string &value, EnumDefinition *definition) : m_definition {definition}
7538 {
7539 if(!value.empty() && definition != nullptr)
7540 {
7541 std::vector<std::string> values = Tools::SplitString(value, ',');
7542 for(auto &item : values)
7543 {
7544 uint32_t v = definition->getValue(item);
7545 m_value |= v;
7546 }
7547 }
7548 }
7549
7556 bool EnumValue::hasFlagValue(uint32_t flags) const
7557 {
7558 if(m_definition->hasValuesAsFlags())
7559 return ((m_value & flags) == flags) ? true : false;
7560
7561 return m_value == flags;
7562 }
7563
7570 bool EnumValue::hasAnyFlagValue(uint32_t flags) const
7571 {
7572 if(m_definition->hasValuesAsFlags())
7573 return ((m_value & flags) != 0);
7574
7575 return m_value == flags;
7576 }
7577
7578 uint32_t EnumValue::getValue() const
7579 {
7580 return m_value;
7581 }
7582
7589 std::string EnumValue::getValueName() const
7590 {
7591 return (m_definition == nullptr) ? "" : m_definition->getValue(m_value);
7592 }
7593
7601 template<typename T>
7602 bool EnumValue::hasFlag(T flags) const
7603 {
7604 return hasFlagValue(static_cast<uint32_t>(flags));
7605 }
7606
7614 template<typename T>
7615 bool EnumValue::hasAnyFlag(T flags) const
7616 {
7617 return hasAnyFlagValue(static_cast<uint32_t>(flags));
7618 }
7619
7620 EnumDefinition *EnumValue::getDefinition() const
7621 {
7622 return m_definition;
7623 }
7624
7625 std::vector<std::string> EnumValue::getValueNames() const
7626 {
7627 return (m_definition == nullptr) ? std::vector<std::string>() : m_definition->getValues(m_value);
7628 }
7629
7635 bool EnumValue::containsValueName(const std::string &value) const
7636 {
7637 if(m_definition != nullptr)
7638 {
7639 if(m_definition->hasValuesAsFlags())
7640 {
7641 std::vector<std::string> values = m_definition->getValues(m_value);
7642 auto it = std::find(values.begin(), values.end(), value);
7643 return it != values.end();
7644 }
7645 return m_definition->getValue(value) == m_value;
7646 }
7647 return false;
7648 }
7649}
7650
7651#endif //TILESON_TILEDENUM_HPP
7652
7653/*** End of inlined file: TiledEnum.hpp ***/
7654
7655
7656/*** Start of inlined file: TiledClass.hpp ***/
7657//
7658// Created by robin on 06.06.22.
7659//
7660
7661#ifndef TILESON_TILEDCLASS_HPP
7662#define TILESON_TILEDCLASS_HPP
7663
7664namespace tson
7665{
7666 //class Project;
7667 class TiledClass
7668 {
7669 public:
7670 inline explicit TiledClass() = default;
7671 inline explicit TiledClass(IJson &json, tson::Project *project = nullptr);
7672
7673 [[nodiscard]] inline uint32_t getId() const;
7674 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getName() const;
7675 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
7676 [[nodiscard]] inline const PropertyCollection &getMembers() const;
7677 inline void update(IJson &json);
7678
7679 template <typename T>
7680 inline T get(const std::string &name);
7681 inline tson::Property *getMember(const std::string &name);
7682
7683 private:
7684 uint32_t m_id {};
7685 std::string m_name {};
7686 std::string m_type {};
7687 PropertyCollection m_members {};
7688
7689 };
7690
7691 TiledClass::TiledClass(IJson &json, tson::Project *project)
7692 {
7693 if(json.count("id") > 0)
7694 m_id = json["id"].get<uint32_t>();
7695
7696 if(json.count("name") > 0)
7697 m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>();
7698 if(json.count("type") > 0)
7699 m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>();
7700
7701 if(json.count("members") > 0 && json["members"].isArray())
7702 {
7703 auto &array = json.array("members");
7704 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
7705 {
7706 m_members.add(*item, project);
7707 });
7708 }
7709 }
7710
7711 uint32_t TiledClass::getId() const
7712 {
7713 return m_id;
7714 }
7715
7716 const std::string &TiledClass::getName() const
7717 {
7718 return m_name;
7719 }
7720
7721 const std::string &TiledClass::getType() const
7722 {
7723 return m_type;
7724 }
7725
7726 const PropertyCollection &TiledClass::getMembers() const
7727 {
7728 return m_members;
7729 }
7730
7731 template<typename T>
7732 T TiledClass::get(const std::string &name)
7733 {
7734 return m_members.getValue<T>(name);
7735 }
7736
7737 tson::Property *TiledClass::getMember(const std::string &name)
7738 {
7739 if(m_members.hasProperty(name))
7740 return m_members.getProperty(name);
7741 return nullptr;
7742 }
7743
7748 void TiledClass::update(IJson &json)
7749 {
7750 for(auto property : m_members.get())
7751 {
7752 if(json.any(property->getName()))
7753 {
7754 property->setValueByType(json[property->getName()]);
7755 }
7756 }
7757 }
7758}
7759
7760#endif //TILESON_TILEDCLASS_HPP
7761
7762/*** End of inlined file: TiledClass.hpp ***/
7763
7764

7768//
7769
7770#ifndef TILESON_PROJECT_HPP
7771#define TILESON_PROJECT_HPP
7772
7773#include <fstream>
7774#include <sstream>
7775#include <memory>
7776
7777/*** Start of inlined file: World.hpp ***/

7781
7782#ifndef TILESON_WORLD_HPP
7783#define TILESON_WORLD_HPP
7784
7785
7786/*** Start of inlined file: WorldMapData.hpp ***/
7787//
7788// Created by robin on 01.08.2020.
7789//
7790
7791#ifndef TILESON_WORLDMAPDATA_HPP
7792#define TILESON_WORLDMAPDATA_HPP
7793
7794namespace tson
7795{
7796 class WorldMapData
7797 {
7798 public:
7799 inline WorldMapData(const fs::path &folder_, IJson &json);
7800 inline void parse(const fs::path &folder_, IJson &json);
7801 //inline WorldMapData(fs::path folder_, std::string fileName_) : folder {std::move(folder_)}, fileName {fileName_}
7802 //{
7803 // path = folder / fileName;
7804 //}
7805
7806 fs::path folder;
7807 fs::path path;
7808 std::string fileName;
7809 tson::Vector2i size;
7810 tson::Vector2i position;
7811 };
7812
7813 WorldMapData::WorldMapData(const fs::path &folder_, IJson &json)
7814 {
7815 parse(folder_, json);
7816 }
7817
7818 void WorldMapData::parse(const fs::path &folder_, IJson &json)
7819 {
7820 folder = folder_;
7821 if(json.count("fileName") > 0) fileName = json["fileName"].get<std::string>();
7822 if(json.count("height") > 0) size = {json["width"].get<int>(), json["height"].get<int>()};
7823 if(json.count("x") > 0) position = {json["x"].get<int>(), json["y"].get<int>()};
7824
7825 path = (!fileName.empty()) ? folder / fileName : folder;
7826 }
7827}
7828
7829#endif //TILESON_WORLDMAPDATA_HPP
7830/*** End of inlined file: WorldMapData.hpp ***/
7831
7832#include <memory>
7833namespace tson
7834{
7835 class Tileson;
7836 class World
7837 {
7838 public:
7839 #ifdef JSON11_IS_DEFINED
7840 inline explicit World(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>()) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
7841 {
7842 }
7843
7844 inline explicit World(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>());
7845 #else
7846 inline explicit World(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
7847 {
7848 }
7849
7850 inline explicit World(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser);
7851 #endif
7852 inline bool parse(const fs::path &path);
7853 inline std::size_t loadMaps(tson::Tileson *parser); //tileson_forward.hpp
7854 inline bool contains(std::string_view filename);
7855 inline const WorldMapData *get(std::string_view filename) const;
7856
7857 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getPath() const;
7858 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getFolder() const;
7859 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<WorldMapData> &getMapData() const;
7860 [[nodiscard]] inline bool onlyShowAdjacentMaps() const;
7861 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::string &getType() const;
7862 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<std::unique_ptr<tson::Map>> &getMaps() const;
7863
7864 private:
7865 inline void parseJson(IJson &json);
7866
7867 std::unique_ptr<IJson> m_json = nullptr;
7868 fs::path m_path;
7869 fs::path m_folder;
7870 std::vector<WorldMapData> m_mapData;
7871 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<tson::Map>> m_maps;
7872 bool m_onlyShowAdjacentMaps;
7873 std::string m_type;
7874 };
7875
7876 World::World(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
7877 {
7878 parse(path);
7879 }
7880
7881 bool World::parse(const fs::path &path)
7882 {
7883 m_path = path;
7884 m_folder = m_path.parent_path();
7885
7886 if(!m_json->parse(path))
7887 return false;
7888
7889 parseJson(*m_json);
7890 return true;
7891 }
7892
7893 const fs::path &World::getPath() const
7894 {
7895 return m_path;
7896 }
7897
7898 const std::vector<WorldMapData> &World::getMapData() const
7899 {
7900 return m_mapData;
7901 }
7902
7903 bool World::onlyShowAdjacentMaps() const
7904 {
7905 return m_onlyShowAdjacentMaps;
7906 }
7907
7908 const std::string &World::getType() const
7909 {
7910 return m_type;
7911 }
7912
7913 void World::parseJson(IJson &json)
7914 {
7915 if(json.count("onlyShowAdjacentMaps") > 0) m_onlyShowAdjacentMaps = json["onlyShowAdjacentMaps"].get<bool>();
7916 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_type = json["type"].get<std::string>();
7917
7918 if(json["maps"].isArray())
7919 {
7920 auto &maps = json.array("maps");
7921 std::for_each(maps.begin(), maps.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_mapData.emplace_back(m_folder, *item); });
7922 }
7923 }
7924
7925 const fs::path &World::getFolder() const
7926 {
7927 return m_folder;
7928 }
7929
7936 bool World::contains(std::string_view filename)
7937 {
7938 //Note: might be moved to std::ranges from C++20.
7939 return std::any_of(m_mapData.begin(), m_mapData.end(), [&](const auto &item) { return item.fileName == filename; });
7940 }
7941
7947 const WorldMapData * World::get(std::string_view filename) const
7948 {
7949 auto iter = std::find_if(m_mapData.begin(), m_mapData.end(), [&](const auto &item) { return item.fileName == filename; });
7950 return (iter == m_mapData.end()) ? nullptr : iter.operator->();
7951 }
7952
7959 const std::vector<std::unique_ptr<tson::Map>> &World::getMaps() const
7960 {
7961 return m_maps;
7962 }
7963
7964}
7965
7966#endif //TILESON_WORLD_HPP
7967
7968/*** End of inlined file: World.hpp ***/
7969
7970
7971
7972/*** Start of inlined file: ProjectPropertyTypes.hpp ***/
7973//
7974// Created by robin on 01.08.22.
7975//
7976
7977#ifndef TILESON_PROJECTPROPERTYTYPES_HPP
7978#define TILESON_PROJECTPROPERTYTYPES_HPP
7979
7980namespace tson
7981{
7982 class ProjectPropertyTypes
7983 {
7984 public:
7985 inline ProjectPropertyTypes() = default;
7986 inline bool parse(IJson &json, tson::Project *project);
7987
7988 inline const std::vector<tson::EnumDefinition> &getEnums() const;
7989 inline const std::vector<tson::TiledClass> &getClasses() const;
7990 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::EnumDefinition* getEnumDefinition(std::string_view name);
7991 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass* getClass(std::string_view name);
7992 inline bool isUnhandledContentFound() const;
7993
7994 private:
7995 std::vector<tson::EnumDefinition> m_enums;
7996 std::vector<tson::TiledClass> m_classes;
7997 bool m_unhandledContentFound {false};
7998
7999 };
8000
8001 bool ProjectPropertyTypes::parse(IJson &json, tson::Project *project)
8002 {
8003 m_enums.clear();
8004 m_classes.clear();
8005 m_unhandledContentFound = false;
8006
8007 if(json.count("propertyTypes") > 0 && json["propertyTypes"].isArray())
8008 {
8009 auto &array = json.array("propertyTypes");
8010 std::vector<tson::IJson*> classes; //Classes must be handled after enums
8011 std::vector<tson::IJson*> other; //Unhandled stuff - just to keep track if something is missing...
8012 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
8013 {
8014 IJson &j = *item;
8015 if(j.count("type") > 0)
8016 {
8017 std::string t = j["type"].get<std::string>();
8018 if(t == "enum")
8019 {
8020 m_enums.emplace_back(j); //Can be resolved directly
8021 }
8022 else if(t == "class")
8023 {
8024 classes.push_back(item.get()); //Must be resolved later
8025 }
8026 else
8027 other.push_back(item.get()); //Only used to set flag for whether unhandled content was found.
8028 }
8029 });
8030
8031 std::for_each(classes.begin(), classes.end(), [&](IJson *item)
8032 {
8033 m_classes.emplace_back(*item, project);
8034 });
8035
8036 if(!other.empty())
8037 m_unhandledContentFound = true;
8038
8039 }
8040 return false;
8041 }
8042
8043 const std::vector<tson::EnumDefinition> &ProjectPropertyTypes::getEnums() const
8044 {
8045 return m_enums;
8046 }
8047
8048 const std::vector<tson::TiledClass> &ProjectPropertyTypes::getClasses() const
8049 {
8050 return m_classes;
8051 }
8052
8053 bool ProjectPropertyTypes::isUnhandledContentFound() const
8054 {
8055 return m_unhandledContentFound;
8056 }
8057
8058 tson::EnumDefinition *ProjectPropertyTypes::getEnumDefinition(std::string_view name)
8059 {
8060 auto it = std::find_if(m_enums.begin(), m_enums.end(), [&](const EnumDefinition &def)
8061 {
8062 return def.getName() == name;
8063 });
8064
8065 if(it != m_enums.end())
8066 return &it.operator*();
8067
8068 return nullptr;
8069 }
8070
8071 tson::TiledClass *ProjectPropertyTypes::getClass(std::string_view name)
8072 {
8073 auto it = std::find_if(m_classes.begin(), m_classes.end(), [&](const TiledClass &def)
8074 {
8075 return def.getName() == name;
8076 });
8077
8078 if(it != m_classes.end())
8079 return &it.operator*();
8080
8081 return nullptr;
8082 }
8083}
8084
8085#endif //TILESON_PROJECTPROPERTYTYPES_HPP
8086
8087/*** End of inlined file: ProjectPropertyTypes.hpp ***/
8088
8089
8090/*** Start of inlined file: ProjectFolder.hpp ***/
8091//
8092// Created by robin on 01.08.2020.
8093//
8094
8095#ifndef TILESON_PROJECTFOLDER_HPP
8096#define TILESON_PROJECTFOLDER_HPP
8097
8098namespace tson
8099{
8100 class ProjectFolder
8101 {
8102 public:
8103 inline ProjectFolder(const fs::path &path);
8104
8105 inline const fs::path &getPath() const;
8106 inline bool hasWorldFile() const;
8107 inline const std::vector<ProjectFolder> &getSubFolders() const;
8108 inline const std::vector<fs::path> &getFiles() const;
8109 inline const World &getWorld() const;
8110
8111 private:
8112 inline void loadData();
8113 fs::path m_path;
8114 bool m_hasWorldFile;
8115 tson::World m_world;
8116 std::vector<ProjectFolder> m_subFolders;
8117 std::vector<fs::path> m_files;
8118
8119 };
8120
8121 ProjectFolder::ProjectFolder(const fs::path &path) : m_path {path}
8122 {
8123 loadData();
8124 }
8125
8126 void ProjectFolder::loadData()
8127 {
8128 m_hasWorldFile = false;
8129 m_subFolders.clear();
8130 m_files.clear();
8131 //Search and see if there is a World file .world file
8132 fs::path worldPath;
8133 for (const auto & entry : fs::directory_iterator(m_path))
8134 {
8135 if(fs::is_regular_file(entry.path()))
8136 {
8137 if(entry.path().extension() == ".world")
8138 {
8139 m_hasWorldFile = true;
8140 worldPath = entry.path();
8141 }
8142 }
8143 }
8144
8145 if(m_hasWorldFile)
8146 m_world.parse(worldPath);
8147
8148 for (const auto & entry : fs::directory_iterator(m_path))
8149 {
8150 if (fs::is_directory(entry.path()))
8151 m_subFolders.emplace_back(entry.path());//.loadData(); - loadData() is called in the constructor, so don't call again.
8152 else if (fs::is_regular_file(entry.path()))
8153 {
8154 if(m_hasWorldFile && m_world.contains(entry.path().filename().generic_string()))
8155 m_files.emplace_back(entry.path());
8156 else if(!m_hasWorldFile)
8157 m_files.emplace_back(entry.path());
8158 }
8159 }
8160
8161 }
8162
8163 const fs::path &ProjectFolder::getPath() const
8164 {
8165 return m_path;
8166 }
8167
8168 bool ProjectFolder::hasWorldFile() const
8169 {
8170 return m_hasWorldFile;
8171 }
8172
8173 const std::vector<ProjectFolder> &ProjectFolder::getSubFolders() const
8174 {
8175 return m_subFolders;
8176 }
8177
8178 const std::vector<fs::path> &ProjectFolder::getFiles() const
8179 {
8180 return m_files;
8181 }
8182
8187 const World &ProjectFolder::getWorld() const
8188 {
8189 return m_world;
8190 }
8191}
8192
8193#endif //TILESON_PROJECTFOLDER_HPP
8194/*** End of inlined file: ProjectFolder.hpp ***/
8195
8196
8197/*** Start of inlined file: ProjectData.hpp ***/
8198//
8199// Created by robin on 01.08.2020.
8200//
8201
8202#ifndef TILESON_PROJECTDATA_HPP
8203#define TILESON_PROJECTDATA_HPP
8204
8205namespace tson
8206{
8207 class ProjectData
8208 {
8209 public:
8210 ProjectData() = default;
8211 std::string automappingRulesFile;
8212 std::vector<std::string> commands;
8213 std::string extensionsPath;
8214 std::vector<std::string> folders;
8215 std::string objectTypesFile;
8216 ProjectPropertyTypes projectPropertyTypes;
8217
8218 //Tileson specific
8219 fs::path basePath;
8220 std::vector<tson::ProjectFolder> folderPaths;
8221 };
8222}
8223
8224#endif //TILESON_PROJECTDATA_HPP
8225/*** End of inlined file: ProjectData.hpp ***/
8226
8227namespace tson
8228{
8229 class Project
8230 {
8231 public:
8232 #ifdef JSON11_IS_DEFINED
8233 inline explicit Project(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>()) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
8234 {
8235
8236 }
8237 inline explicit Project(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>());
8238 #else
8239 inline explicit Project(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
8240 {
8241
8242 }
8243 inline explicit Project(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser);
8244 #endif
8245 inline bool parse(const fs::path &path);
8246 inline void parse();
8247
8248 [[nodiscard]] inline const ProjectData &getData() const;
8249 [[nodiscard]] inline const fs::path &getPath() const;
8250 [[nodiscard]] inline const std::vector<ProjectFolder> &getFolders() const;
8251 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::EnumDefinition* getEnumDefinition(std::string_view name);
8252 [[nodiscard]] inline tson::TiledClass* getClass(std::string_view name);
8253
8254 private:
8255 inline void parseJson(IJson &json);
8256 fs::path m_path;
8257 std::vector<ProjectFolder> m_folders;
8258 ProjectData m_data;
8259 std::unique_ptr<IJson> m_json = nullptr;
8260 };
8261
8262 Project::Project(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
8263 {
8264 parse(path);
8265 }
8266
8267 bool Project::parse(const fs::path &path)
8268 {
8269 m_path = path;
8270 std::ifstream i(m_path.generic_string());
8271
8272 try
8273 {
8274 if(!m_json->parse(path))
8275 return false;
8276 }
8277 catch(const std::exception &error)
8278 {
8279 std::string message = "Parse error: ";
8280 message += std::string(error.what());
8281 message += std::string("\n");
8282 return false;
8283 }
8284 parseJson(*m_json);
8285 return true;
8286 }
8287
8288 const ProjectData &Project::getData() const
8289 {
8290 return m_data;
8291 }
8292
8293 void Project::parseJson(IJson &json)
8294 {
8295 m_data.basePath = (m_path.empty()) ? fs::path() : m_path.parent_path(); //The directory of the project file
8296
8297 //Make sure these property types are read before any map is, so they can be resolved.
8298 if(json.count("propertyTypes") > 0)
8299 {
8300 m_data.projectPropertyTypes.parse(json, this);
8301 }
8302
8303 if(json.count("automappingRulesFile") > 0) m_data.automappingRulesFile = json["automappingRulesFile"].get<std::string>();
8304 if(json.count("commands") > 0)
8305 {
8306 m_data.commands.clear();
8307 auto &commands = json.array("commands");
8308 std::for_each(commands.begin(), commands.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
8309 {
8310 m_data.commands.emplace_back(item->get<std::string>());
8311 });
8312 }
8313 if(json.count("extensionsPath") > 0) m_data.extensionsPath = json["extensionsPath"].get<std::string>();
8314 if(json.count("folders") > 0)
8315 {
8316 m_data.folders.clear();
8317 m_data.folderPaths.clear();
8318 auto &folders = json.array("folders");
8319 std::for_each(folders.begin(), folders.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item)
8320 {
8321 std::string folder = item->get<std::string>();
8322 m_data.folders.emplace_back(folder);
8323 m_data.folderPaths.emplace_back(m_data.basePath / folder);
8324 m_folders.emplace_back(m_data.basePath / folder);
8325 });
8326 }
8327 if(json.count("objectTypesFile") > 0) m_data.objectTypesFile = json["objectTypesFile"].get<std::string>();
8328 }
8329
8330 const fs::path &Project::getPath() const
8331 {
8332 return m_path;
8333 }
8334
8335 const std::vector<ProjectFolder> &Project::getFolders() const
8336 {
8337 return m_folders;
8338 }
8339
8340 tson::EnumDefinition *Project::getEnumDefinition(std::string_view name)
8341 {
8342 return m_data.projectPropertyTypes.getEnumDefinition(name);
8343 }
8344
8345 tson::TiledClass *Project::getClass(std::string_view name)
8346 {
8347 return m_data.projectPropertyTypes.getClass(name);
8348 }
8349
8354 void Project::parse()
8355 {
8356 parseJson(*m_json);
8357 }
8358
8359}
8360
8361#endif //TILESON_PROJECT_HPP
8362
8363/*** End of inlined file: Project.hpp ***/
8364
8365namespace tson
8366{
8367 class Tileson
8368 {
8369 public:
8370 #ifdef JSON11_IS_DEFINED
8371 inline explicit Tileson(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>(), bool includeBase64Decoder = true);
8372 inline explicit Tileson(tson::Project *project, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser = std::make_unique<tson::Json11>(), bool includeBase64Decoder = true);
8373 #else
8374 inline explicit Tileson(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser, bool includeBase64Decoder = true);
8375 inline explicit Tileson(tson::Project *project, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser, bool includeBase64Decoder = true);
8376 #endif
8377
8378 inline std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> parse(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<IDecompressor<std::vector<uint8_t>, std::vector<uint8_t>>> decompressor = nullptr);
8379 inline std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> parse(const void * data, size_t size, std::unique_ptr<IDecompressor<std::vector<uint8_t>, std::vector<uint8_t>>> decompressor = nullptr);
8380 inline tson::DecompressorContainer *decompressors();
8381
8382 private:
8383 inline std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> parseJson();
8384 std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> m_json;
8385 tson::DecompressorContainer m_decompressors;
8386 tson::Project *m_project {nullptr};
8387 };
8388}
8389
8395tson::Tileson::Tileson(std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser, bool includeBase64Decoder) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
8396{
8397 if(includeBase64Decoder)
8398 m_decompressors.add<Base64Decompressor>();
8399}
8400
8401tson::Tileson::Tileson(tson::Project *project, std::unique_ptr<tson::IJson> jsonParser, bool includeBase64Decoder) : m_json {std::move(jsonParser)}
8402{
8403 m_project = project;
8404 if(includeBase64Decoder)
8405 m_decompressors.add<Base64Decompressor>();
8406}
8407
8413std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> tson::Tileson::parse(const fs::path &path, std::unique_ptr<IDecompressor<std::vector<uint8_t>, std::vector<uint8_t>>> decompressor)
8414{
8415
8416 bool result = false;
8417
8418 if(decompressor != nullptr)
8419 {
8420 std::vector<uint8_t> decompressed = decompressor->decompressFile(path);
8421 result = (decompressed.empty()) ? false : true;
8422 if(!result)
8423 return std::make_unique<tson::Map>(tson::ParseStatus::DecompressionError, "Error during decompression");
8424
8425 result = m_json->parse(&decompressed[0], decompressed.size());
8426
8427 if(result)
8428 return std::move(parseJson());
8429 }
8430 else if(m_json->parse(path))
8431 {
8432 return std::move(parseJson());
8433 }
8434
8435 std::string msg = "File not found: ";
8436 msg += std::string(path.generic_string());
8437 return std::make_unique<tson::Map>(tson::ParseStatus::FileNotFound, msg);
8438}
8439
8446std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> tson::Tileson::parse(const void *data, size_t size, std::unique_ptr<IDecompressor<std::vector<uint8_t>, std::vector<uint8_t>>> decompressor)
8447{
8448 bool result = false;
8449
8450 if(decompressor != nullptr)
8451 {
8452 std::vector<uint8_t> decompressed = decompressor->decompress(data, size);
8453 result = (decompressed.empty()) ? false : true;
8454 if(!result)
8455 return std::make_unique<tson::Map>(tson::ParseStatus::DecompressionError, "Error during decompression");
8456 result = m_json->parse(&decompressed[0], decompressed.size());
8457 }
8458 else
8459 result = m_json->parse(data, size);
8460
8461 if(!result)
8462 return std::make_unique<tson::Map>(tson::ParseStatus::ParseError, "Memory error");
8463
8464 return std::move(parseJson());
8465}
8466
8472std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> tson::Tileson::parseJson()
8473{
8474 std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> map = std::make_unique<tson::Map>();
8475
8476 if(map->parse(*m_json, &m_decompressors, m_project))
8477 return std::move(map);
8478
8479 return std::make_unique<tson::Map> (tson::ParseStatus::MissingData, "Missing map data...");
8480}
8481
8489tson::DecompressorContainer *tson::Tileson::decompressors()
8490{
8491 return &m_decompressors;
8492}
8493
8494#endif //TILESON_TILESON_PARSER_HPP
8495
8496/*** End of inlined file: tileson_parser.hpp ***/
8497

8500//
8501// Created by robin on 25.07.2020.
8502//

8515

8523
8524// T i l e . h p p
8525// ---------------------
8526
8531const tson::Vector2i tson::Tile::getTileSize() const
8532{
8533 if(m_map != nullptr)
8534 return m_map->getTileSize();
8535 else
8536 return {0,0};
8537}
8538
8539bool tson::Tile::parseId(IJson &json)
8540{
8541 if(json.count("id") > 0)
8542 {
8543 m_id = json["id"].get<uint32_t>() + 1;
8544 if (m_tileset != nullptr)
8545 m_gid = m_tileset->getFirstgid() + m_id - 1;
8546 else
8547 m_gid = m_id;
8548 manageFlipFlagsByIdThenRemoveFlags(m_gid);
8549 return true;
8550 }
8551 return false;
8552}
8553
8558void tson::Tile::performDataCalculations()
8559{
8560 if(m_tileset == nullptr || m_map == nullptr)
8561 return;
8562
8563 int firstId = m_tileset->getFirstgid(); //First tile id of the tileset
8564 int columns = m_tileset->getColumns();
8565 int rows = m_tileset->getTileCount() / columns;
8566 int lastId = (m_tileset->getFirstgid() + m_tileset->getTileCount()) - 1;
8567
8568 int const gid = static_cast<int>(getGid());
8569 if (gid >= firstId && gid <= lastId)
8570 {
8571 int const baseTilePosition = (gid - firstId);
8572
8573 int const tileModX = (baseTilePosition % columns);
8574 int const currentRow = (baseTilePosition / columns);
8575 int const offsetX = (tileModX != 0) ? ((tileModX) * m_map->getTileSize().x) : (0 * m_map->getTileSize().x);
8576 int const offsetY = (currentRow < rows-1) ? (currentRow * m_map->getTileSize().y) : ((rows-1) * m_map->getTileSize().y);
8577
8578 tson::Vector2i spacing = m_tileset->getMarginSpacingOffset({tileModX, currentRow});
8579 m_drawingRect = { offsetX + spacing.x, offsetY + spacing.y, m_map->getTileSize().x, m_map->getTileSize().y };
8580 }
8581 else
8582 m_drawingRect = {0, 0, 0, 0};
8583}
8584
8589const tson::Vector2f tson::Tile::getPosition(const std::tuple<int, int> &tileDataPos)
8590{
8591 return {((float) std::get<0>(tileDataPos)) * m_drawingRect.width, ((float) std::get<1>(tileDataPos)) * m_drawingRect.height};
8592}
8593
8599tson::TiledClass *tson::Tile::getClass()
8600{
8601 return (m_map != nullptr && m_map->getProject() != nullptr) ? m_map->getProject()->getClass(m_type) : nullptr;
8602}
8603
8604// T i l e s e t . h p p
8605// ------------------------

8607tson::TiledClass *tson::Tileset::getClass()
8608{
8609 return (m_map != nullptr && m_map->getProject() != nullptr) ? m_map->getProject()->getClass(m_classType) : nullptr;
8610}

8621void tson::TileObject::initialize(const std::tuple<int, int> &posInTileUnits, tson::Tile *tile)
8622{
8623 m_tile = tile;
8624 m_posInTileUnits = tile->getPositionInTileUnits(posInTileUnits);
8625 m_position = tile->getPosition(posInTileUnits);
8626}

8628const tson::Rect &tson::TileObject::getDrawingRect() const
8629{
8630 return m_tile->getDrawingRect();
8631}

8633// L a y e r . h p p
8634// -------------------
8635
8639void tson::Layer::decompressData()
8640{
8641
8642 tson::DecompressorContainer *container = m_map->getDecompressors();
8643 if(container->empty())
8644 return;
8645
8646 if(m_encoding.empty() && m_compression.empty())
8647 return;
8648
8649 std::string data = m_base64Data;
8650 bool hasBeenDecoded = false;
8651 if(!m_encoding.empty() && container->contains(m_encoding))
8652 {
8653 data = container->get(m_encoding)->decompress(data);
8654 hasBeenDecoded = true;
8655 }
8656
8657 if(!m_compression.empty() && container->contains(m_compression))
8658 {
8659 data = container->get(m_compression)->decompress(data);
8660 }
8661
8662 if(hasBeenDecoded)
8663 {
8664 std::vector<uint8_t> bytes = tson::Tools::Base64DecodedStringToBytes(data);
8665 m_data = tson::Tools::BytesToUnsignedInts(bytes);
8666 }
8667}
8668
8674bool tson::Layer::parse(IJson &json, tson::Map *map)
8675{
8676 m_map = map;
8677
8678 bool allFound = true;
8679 if(json.count("tintcolor") > 0) m_tintColor = tson::Colori(json["tintcolor"].get<std::string>()); //Optional
8680 if(json.count("compression") > 0) m_compression = json["compression"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
8681 if(json.count("draworder") > 0) m_drawOrder = json["draworder"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
8682 if(json.count("encoding") > 0) m_encoding = json["encoding"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
8683 if(json.count("id") > 0) m_id = json["id"].get<int>(); //Optional
8684 if(json.count("image") > 0) m_image = json["image"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
8685 if(json.count("name") > 0) m_name = json["name"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
8686 if(json.count("offsetx") > 0 && json.count("offsety") > 0)
8687 m_offset = {json["offsetx"].get<float>(), json["offsety"].get<float>()}; //Optional
8688 if(json.count("opacity") > 0) m_opacity = json["opacity"].get<float>(); else allFound = false;
8689 if(json.count("width") > 0 && json.count("height") > 0)
8690 m_size = {json["width"].get<int>(), json["height"].get<int>()}; //else allFound = false; - Not mandatory for all layers!
8691 if(json.count("transparentcolor") > 0) m_transparentColor = tson::Colori(json["transparentcolor"].get<std::string>()); //Optional
8692 if(json.count("type") > 0) m_typeStr = json["type"].get<std::string>(); else allFound = false;
8693 if(json.count("class") > 0) m_classType = json["class"].get<std::string>(); //Optional
8694 if(json.count("visible") > 0) m_visible = json["visible"].get<bool>(); else allFound = false;
8695 if(json.count("x") > 0) m_x = json["x"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
8696 if(json.count("y") > 0) m_y = json["y"].get<int>(); else allFound = false;
8697 if(json.count("repeatx") > 0) m_repeatX = json["repeatx"].get<bool>(); //Optional
8698 if(json.count("repeaty") > 0) m_repeatY = json["repeaty"].get<bool>(); //Optional
8699
8700 tson::Vector2f parallax {1.f, 1.f};
8701 if(json.count("parallaxx") > 0)
8702 parallax.x = json["parallaxx"].get<float>();
8703 if(json.count("parallaxy") > 0)
8704 parallax.y = json["parallaxy"].get<float>();
8705
8706 m_parallax = parallax;
8707
8708 //Handle DATA (Optional)
8709 if(json.count("data") > 0)
8710 {
8711 if(json["data"].isArray())
8712 {
8713 auto &array = json.array("data");
8714 std::for_each(array.begin(), array.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_data.push_back(item->get<uint32_t>()); });
8715 }
8716 else
8717 {
8718 m_base64Data = json["data"].get<std::string>();
8719 decompressData();
8720 }
8721 }
8722
8723 //More advanced data
8724 if(json.count("chunks") > 0 && json["chunks"].isArray())
8725 {
8726 auto &chunks = json.array("chunks");
8727 std::for_each(chunks.begin(), chunks.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_chunks.emplace_back(*item); });
8728 }
8729 if(json.count("layers") > 0 && json["layers"].isArray())
8730 {
8731 auto &layers = json.array("layers");
8732 std::for_each(layers.begin(), layers.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_layers.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
8733 }
8734 if(json.count("objects") > 0 && json["objects"].isArray())
8735 {
8736 auto &objects = json.array("objects");
8737 std::for_each(objects.begin(), objects.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_objects.emplace_back(*item, m_map); });
8738 }
8739 if(json.count("properties") > 0 && json["properties"].isArray())
8740 {
8741 auto &properties = json.array("properties");
8742 tson::Project *project = (m_map != nullptr) ? m_map->getProject() : nullptr;
8743 std::for_each(properties.begin(), properties.end(), [&](std::unique_ptr<IJson> &item) { m_properties.add(*item, project); });
8744 }
8745
8746 setTypeByString();
8747
8748 return allFound;
8749}
8750
8751tson::TiledClass *tson::Layer::getClass()
8752{
8753 return (m_map != nullptr && m_map->getProject() != nullptr) ? m_map->getProject()->getClass(m_classType) : nullptr;
8754}

8783// W o r l d . h p p
8784// ------------------
8785
8791
8792std::size_t tson::World::loadMaps(tson::Tileson *parser)
8793{
8794 m_maps.clear();
8795 std::for_each(m_mapData.begin(), m_mapData.end(), [&](const tson::WorldMapData &data)
8796 {
8797 if(fs::exists(data.path))
8798 {
8799 std::unique_ptr<tson::Map> map = parser->parse(data.path);
8800 m_maps.push_back(std::move(map));
8801 }
8802 });
8803
8804 return m_maps.size();
8805}
8806
8807// P r o p e r t y . h p p
8808// ------------------
8809void tson::Property::setValueByType(IJson &json)
8810{
8811 switch(m_type)
8812 {
8813 case Type::Color:
8814 m_value = Colori(json.get<std::string>());
8815 break;
8816
8817 case Type::File:
8818 m_value = fs::path(json.get<std::string>());
8819 break;
8820
8821 case Type::Int:
8822 if(!m_propertyType.empty())
8823 {
8824 m_type = Type::Enum;
8825 tson::EnumDefinition *def = (m_project != nullptr) ? m_project->getEnumDefinition(m_propertyType) : nullptr;
8826 if(def != nullptr)
8827 {
8828 uint32_t v = json.get<uint32_t>();
8829 m_value = tson::EnumValue(v, def);
8830 }
8831 else
8832 m_value = tson::EnumValue();
8833 }
8834 else
8835 m_value = json.get<int>();
8836
8837 break;
8838
8839 case Type::Boolean:
8840 m_value = json.get<bool>();
8841 break;
8842
8843 case Type::Float:
8844 m_value = json.get<float>();
8845 break;
8846
8847 case Type::String:
8848 if(!m_propertyType.empty())
8849 {
8850 m_type = Type::Enum;
8851 tson::EnumDefinition *def = (m_project != nullptr) ? m_project->getEnumDefinition(m_propertyType) : nullptr;
8852 if(def != nullptr)
8853 {
8854 std::string v = json.get<std::string>();
8855 m_value = tson::EnumValue(v, def);
8856 }
8857 else
8858 m_value = tson::EnumValue();
8859 }
8860 else
8861 setStrValue(json.get<std::string>());
8862
8863 break;
8864
8865 case Type::Class:
8866 {
8867 tson::TiledClass *baseClass = (m_project != nullptr) ? m_project->getClass(m_propertyType) : nullptr;
8868 if (baseClass != nullptr)
8869 {
8870 tson::TiledClass c = *baseClass;
8871 c.update(json);
8872 m_value = c;
8873 }
8874 }
8875 break;
8876
8877 case Type::Object:
8878 m_value = json.get<uint32_t>();
8879 break;
8880 default:
8881 setStrValue(json.get<std::string>());
8882 break;
8883 }
8884}
